programme.desc: Being the cool dad that he is, Phil helps Haley convince Claire to allow Dylan to move in temporarily, but after seeing how intimate living together means, Phil is having major second thoughts.

programme.title: Modern Family: She Crazy
programme.desc: Phil is all in on project hatch-the-duck-eggs, even building a whole habitat for them. No one else is as enthused about this project and Lily is the only one suckered into helping him.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Verdict
programme.desc: Claire is excited to give Haley and Alex a great experience for 'Bring Your Daughter to Work Day' but the staff is not making it easy. Elsewhere, Phil takes Luke and Manny's class out for community service day.

programme.title: Modern Family: The More You Ignore Me
programme.desc: Claire and Phil have their hands full when Luke gets arrested for driving without a license, then they catch Alex sneaking out of a liquor store, but that’s on top of Phil dealing with some personal insecurities.

programme.title: Modern Family: Phil's Sexy, Sexy House
programme.desc: Everyone is at Jay and Gloria's for post-Thanksgiving leftovers brunch, and after a conversation about the sexy and sleek house that Phil is helping Mitch and Cam's friend sell, everyone gets the same bright idea to sneak in there and have a little 'fun.'

programme.title: Modern Family: Clean Out Your Junk Drawer
programme.desc: Gloria wins a bid at the school auction for a family seminar with famed doctor and author Debra Radcliffe, whose self-help book 'Clean Out Your Junk Drawer' encourages people to get rid of all their emotional junk to become healthier people.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Dirty
programme.desc: Detective Saliyah 'Sunny' Qadri goes in search of District Attorney Page Ferguson, who she fears may be in danger. Qadri finds Ferguson just in time to witness her fall from the top of a parking garage.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Flight
programme.desc: When it is discovered that a teenage girl is suffering from Post Traumatic Stress Disorder due to sexual abuse, all leads point to a billionaire. As the detectives investigate, the billionaire involves his lawyer, who throws the whole case awry.

programme.title: Dateline: Heart of Darkness
programme.desc: After a Virginia man’s wife and son are kidnapped while on vacation in the Philippines, a dangerous group of international terrorists demands millions in ransom. With time running out, the FBI joins the case, which comes to a heart-stopping conclusion.

programme.title: Dateline: Diabolical
programme.desc: Michelle Hadley speaks for the first time about being falsely accused of attempted rape on Angela Diaz. Diaz was charged recently with multiple felony counts for framing Hadley, who was previously engaged to Diaz's husband.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Vengeance
programme.desc: When the body of a Navy Intel Officer is found, evidence points to a team of Navy SEALS who are about to depart on a hostage rescue mission. That leaves former SEAL Sam Hanna to interrogate the group, which could compromise the mission.

programme.title: NCIS: Lt. Jane Doe
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team investigate the murder and rape of an unidentified Navy lieutenant.

programme.title: NCIS: Monsters and Men
programme.desc: The murder of a port authority officer reveals Parsa's possible whereabouts, as the team continues their tireless hunt. Meanwhile, Bishop reveals her past association with the elusive terrorist.

programme.title: NCIS: Bulletproof
programme.desc: After uncovering faulty bulletproof vests in a truck filled with stolen U.S. M.C. merchandise, the team attempts to locate both the source and any vests that had been shipped to military personnel overseas.

programme.title: NCIS: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When DiNozzo confronts a man impersonating a navy officer, guns are drawn and the perpetrator is left dead. The subsequent investigation uncovers that the only eyewitness is DiNozzo's father, who is in town to disclose a secret to his son.

programme.title: NCIS: Rock and a Hard Place
programme.desc: After a bomb detonates in the dressing room at a military charity concert, the NCIS team must determine if the target was a washed-up '80s rocker or if the bomb was part of a larger scheme. Meanwhile, Jimmy prepares for fatherhood.

programme.title: NCIS: Crescent City
programme.desc: When the body of Congressman Dan McLane washes ashore in New Orleans, Gibbs reunites with his former colleague in a joint case between the two field offices and the FBI. The teams must work together to determine if the murder was politically based.

programme.title: NCIS: Alleged

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Yesterday, Today, Tomorrow
programme.desc: Jane and Maura work to solve two murders, one from the past and one present day, which have deep personal connections for Korsak. Jane gets a surprise visit that might lead to romance, and Maura gets upsetting feedback on her novel.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Ocean Frank
programme.desc: The facts don't add up when a dead man is found handcuffed to a bed in his own home. As the bon voyage party approaches, everyone makes a video to say goodbye. Everyone says farewell and plans for their next adventure.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: See One, Do One, Teach One
programme.desc: Detective Rizzoli and medical examiner Isles investigate the grisly murder of a wealthy couple. The M.O. matches the work of a serial killer known as the Surgeon. Now that the Surgeon is behind bars, it seems a protégé is picking up where he left off.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Boston Strangler Redux
programme.desc: Tensions are high as the squad investigates a possible copycat of the legendary Boston Strangler.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sympathy for the Devil
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate the mysterious death of a young boy who may have died during an attempted exorcism.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: She Works Hard for the Money
programme.desc: After a student is gunned down in broad daylight, the investigation reveals she had more than a few secrets. Meanwhile, Jane's mother Angela gets into a spat with her father over the car.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: The eldest brother in a Boston Brahmin family is found in the harbour dead after an apparent sailing accident. Maura's close connection with the family and Jane's resentment over their wealth threaten to derail the investigation.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: I Kissed a Girl
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate what appears to be a hate crime: the brutal assault and murder of a woman leaving a lesbian bar. With Jane going undercover, they hope to lure the killer out in the open.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: New Year, New You
programme.desc: How to improve your smile with Invisalign; supplements to fuel your body & protein you actually enjoy taking; Quick Bytes with Ralph Pagano--Plant-based; tools to help you reach your health & wellness goals; how to develop your child's reading skills.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: It's the End of the World
programme.desc: Meredith's fear that she's in for a bad day when a medical case arrives at Seattle Grace that threatens the lives of everyone in the operating room.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: As We Know It
programme.desc: Despite the best efforts of Seattle Grace's staff, the code black situation escalates.

programme.title: The Closer: No Good Deed
programme.desc: When the star witness in a death-row inmate's appeal case is gunned down, Brenda and her team discover that there is more than one suspect with a motive. Meanwhile, Chief Pope's vengeful ex-wife airs Brenda's secrets in front of her team.

programme.title: The Closer: Overkill
programme.desc: Brenda and Fritz have a hard time agreeing who is in charge when an informant's wife and FBI agent are both murdered. Brenda discovers that she and the PHD must work quickly when the leading witness in the case testifies against a powerful mobster.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sweet Revenge
programme.desc: The mysterious murder of a tech-entrepreneur with questionable morals and possible mob connections has the division working overtime. Meanwhile, Rusty struggles to feel accepted when Raydor's son Ricky comes to visit.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Zoo Story
programme.desc: The LAPD finds itself in a precarious situation during an investigation into the disappearances of a string of young girls from a nightclub leading to a turf battle between the Major Crimes division and the Special Operations Bureau.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Down the Drain
programme.desc: A surrogate adoption gets complicated, leaving one person dead and a lot of people searching for answers. The Major Crimes division gets their hands dirty as they explore LA's underground water system.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Born to Run
programme.desc: The Boston Marathon turns into a crime scene when a shooter begins targeting runners. Racing to catch the killer before another shooting, Jane and Maura must conduct their investigation in secret to avoid panic.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Killer Cop
programme.desc: Rookie police officer James Duckett is sentenced to death for the rape and murder of a young girl. Fourteen years later, a homicide detective gets a letter from Duckett and becomes convinced of his innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Love Kills
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Stacey Stites' body is found half-naked by the side of the road, her fiancé, police officer Jimmy Fennell, is cleared as a suspect.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Blood and Water
programme.desc: Army vet Joe D'Ambrosio is sentenced to death for a 1988 murder. No one listened to his pleas of innocence until Father Neil Kookoothe began investigating the case and discovered a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Wealthy Widow
programme.desc: A widow's tears after her husband's roadside murder on the Ohio Turnpike help investigators uncover secret drug addictions and illicit affairs.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Trust Fund Terror
programme.desc: The brutal slaying of a Fresno family leaves one heir to the family fortune and investigators searching for answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: The Presidential Inauguration
programme.desc: Coverage of the 2021 inauguration of President Biden and Vice President Harris.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Moonshiners: No Ordinary Run
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws unleash a 700-gallon run on a whisper-quiet steamer still. Mark and Huck traverse Appalachia's roughest terrain to run liquor with moonshine legend Jim Tom. Mike and Jerry engineer a high-tech solution to a backwoods problem.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Single Malt Moonshine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger's plan to employ an out of work friend backfires on payday. Tim invents a low-cost way to make his first single-malt moonshine. With their backwoods column still cranking out liquor, Mike discovers Jerry isn't carrying his own weight.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Overproof and Under the Gun
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt oatmeal raisin shine for a high-flying Nashville customer. Mike and Jerry find themselves under the gun when they overdeliver on proof to a biker gang. Mark and Huck forge a lifeline to old-time shiners deep in the mountains.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Single Malt Moonshine
programme.desc: With bonus scenes and added features: Tim comes up with a recipe for single-malt shine while Mike finds himself shorthanded. Later, Tickle and the Laws start a massive rye run.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Sweet Corn Revenge
programme.desc: After Mike asks the wrong shiner for help, Mark and Digger land a skilled new partner. On a mountain run, Mark and Huck nearly meet the barrel of a gun. Jerry attempts a comeback as a land sale forces him and Mike to abandon their column still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Tim and his help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery in hopes of turning it from problem to profit. Mark and Digger confront a shiner who's been edging into their territory. Lance surprises Jeff with an unorthodox moonshine ingredient.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Navy Strength Rum
programme.desc: Outlaw shiners and legal distillers compete to distill true Navy Strength Rum, but the bar for entry is 114-proof. With Tickle as honorary pirate and judged by shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one distiller can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Sweet Corn Revenge
programme.desc: After Mike asks the wrong shiner for help, Mark and Digger land a skilled new partner. On a mountain run, Mark and Huck nearly meet the barrel of a gun. Jerry attempts a comeback as a land sale forces him and Mike to abandon their column still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Tim and his help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery in hopes of turning it from problem to profit. Mark and Digger confront a shiner who's been edging into their territory. Lance surprises Jeff with an unorthodox moonshine ingredient.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Navy Strength Rum
programme.desc: Outlaw shiners and legal distillers compete to distill true Navy Strength Rum, but the bar for entry is 114-proof. With Tickle as honorary pirate and judged by shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one distiller can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: High Proof Cherry Bounce
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make a 300-year-old spirit called Cherry Bounce, a favorite drink of George Washington, nearly lost to time. Josh Owens, whose family kept the recipe alive for generations in the backwoods, joins as guest judge.

programme.title: Secret America
programme.desc: They are the most iconic symbols of America, but lurking behind each one are conspiracy theories, myths, and lies.

programme.title: Secret America
programme.desc: They are the most iconic symbols of America: but lurking behind each one are conspiracy theories, myths, and lies.

programme.title: Ultimate Armored Car: The Presidential Beast
programme.desc: Texas Armoring Corporation builds the toughest cars in the world. Using high-powered guns and explosives, they demonstrate the destruction that enamored vehicles might face and how they compare to the ultimate armored car - the President's limo.

programme.title: Flipping the White House
programme.desc: A crew of 93 White House staffers only have five hours to get the place ready for the new President of the United States.

programme.title: How Booze Built America: America's Revolution
programme.desc: Alcohol shaped the colonial life that caused the Boston Tea Party, which ultimately led to the American Revolution.

programme.title: How Booze Built America: Westward, Ho!
programme.desc: Mike shows us how alcohol helped push America west where liquored up cowboys shot each other at the OK Corral.

programme.title: How Booze Built America: To the Moon!
programme.desc: Mike looks into the prohibition, a space race and who actually killed JFK.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: America's Lost WWII Hero
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores the case of lost World War II hero Gertrude 'Tommy' Tompkins of the Women Air Force Service Pilots, who went missing when her P-51 Mustang crashed. Josh joins search teams using cutting-edge technology to bring the lost hero home.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Digging Into D-Day
programme.desc: Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the Secret
programme.desc: Josh Gates is on a nation-wide treasure hunt to solve a mystery no one has cracked for forty years: The Secret. Josh travels coast-to-coast and back in time using cutting edge augmented reality and tapping into a network of obsessed Secret detectives.

programme.title: Unpolished: A New Beginning
programme.desc: A devastating loss hits the Martone family at its core as sisters Lexi and Bria and their mother Jennifer work together to reopen the salon after being closed due to the pandemic.

programme.title: Unexpected: Catching Up With Hailey 1
programme.desc: Tiarra hears the Matthew drama when she gets together with Hailey. Taron threatens to take Reanna to court to see his baby. Myrka and Ethan prepare for an extravagant gender reveal party. Jenna's dad refuses to let her mom be a part of the baby shower.

programme.title: Unexpected: Fighting With Your Mom on Social Media
programme.desc: Myrka and Liliana have a blowout fight over social media. Jenna gives her parents an ultimatum -- get along at the baby shower. Reanna and Taron sit down with their moms to sort out custody. Tyra gets stuck in a storm on the way to see Alex and Layla.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Did Somebody Shrink You?
programme.desc: Trent and Amber surprise Emma and Alex with a go kart so that they can practice driving. Meanwhile, Elizabeth is making big strides in her nursing career, but she is not happy to see her younger siblings behind the wheel before she has her own license.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Are You Gonna Marry Liz?
programme.desc: Liz's best little people friends, Carol and Dacey, come to town for a visit and have a lot of questions for her boyfriend, Brice. Despite a lack of social media skills, Trent tries to join in on the success of his kids' online shops.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Weight-Loss Surgery
programme.desc: While Whitney is undecided about where to live, the Greensboro crew hatches a plan to lure her back home and away from Ryan -- for good. With the fate of the business in jeopardy and her love life in ruins, Whitney faces some tough decisions.

programme.title: Unpolished: Where's the Money?
programme.desc: Big Mike's passing and the pandemic have left Jen in a financial mess, putting Bria's fairytale wedding in jeopardy. Bria and Lexi collaborate on a client's unique request for her daughter's birthday. The Martone ladies go to extreme lengths for help.

programme.title: Unexpected: Fighting With Your Mom on Social Media
programme.desc: Myrka and Liliana have a blowout fight over social media. Jenna gives her parents an ultimatum -- get along at the baby shower. Reanna and Taron sit down with their moms to sort out custody. Tyra gets stuck in a storm on the way to see Alex and Layla.

programme.desc: Big Mike's passing and the pandemic have left Jen in a financial mess, putting Bria's fairytale wedding in jeopardy. Bria and Lexi collaborate on a client's unique request for her daughter's birthday. The Martone ladies go to extreme lengths for help.

programme.title: Unexpected: Fighting With Your Mom on Social Media
programme.desc: Myrka and Liliana have a blowout fight over social media. Jenna gives her parents an ultimatum -- get along at the baby shower. Reanna and Taron sit down with their moms to sort out custody. Tyra gets stuck in a storm on the way to see Alex and Layla.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Confronting Meri
programme.desc: Even as the wives bask in the glow of their first grandchild, tensions emerge. Meri found out that all the wives were at the birth, except her. Intense therapy sessions fail to resolve the hurt, so Christine confronts Meri with some brutal truths.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Gown Worth the Trip
programme.desc: With Alaska coming up short on dress options, Liz has flown 4,000 miles and must find something. Norwegian Amanda has exhausted all options in Europe, with high hopes for the salon. After losing 18 pounds, Danielle worries her gown won't show her curves.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sister Act!
programme.desc: Samantha is a triplet whose opinionated sisters want to make the final dress decision! Sisters Jessica and Kristen shop together to find they have surprisingly similar tastes. Amy opted for a more modest dress, but is having second thoughts.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sexy Sells
programme.desc: Nik Wallenda pushes for his wife Erendira to choose a sexy gown – within limits! Amy returns for a dress that's even racier than her last one, but her twin still begs her to cover up. Jaya is hesitant to adhere to her fiancé's form fitting preference.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Sale Is on
programme.desc: Women come from all over the country for Kleinfeld's famous sample sale where they can buy gorgeous gowns at rock bottom prices. These brides have just three hours to sort through hundreds of designer options in the quest to find their dream dress.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: A Big Fat Ultimatum
programme.desc: With Chase long gone and Buddy on the fence about staying with her, Whitney considers packing it all in and heading home to Greensboro. When Ryan finds out, however, he throws down a pretty hefty ultimatum, threatening her to stay in Charlotte -- or else!

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Weight-Loss Surgery
programme.desc: While Whitney is undecided about where to live, the Greensboro crew hatches a plan to lure her back home and away from Ryan -- for good. With the fate of the business in jeopardy and her love life in ruins, Whitney faces some tough decisions.

programme.title: 600 Pound Mom
programme.desc: Dominique is imprisoned within her house because of morbid obesity, leaving her six daughters worried for her life. Dominique will have to shed 112 lbs. to qualify for weight-loss surgery, her only hope.

programme.title: 600 Pound Mom: Race Against Time
programme.desc: Dominique's severe addiction to food prevented her from losing enough pounds to have weight loss surgery. This single mom of six continues to struggle with her diet.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tommy's Story
programme.desc: Tommy wants to lose weight so he can marry his fiancée and have the life he always dreamed of with her, but to break the cycle of pathological eating that left him nearly bed-bound, he'll have to face a piece of his past he has always kept secret.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tiffany's Story
programme.desc: Despite moving to Houston with the solid support network of her boyfriend Aaron and her cousin Jasmine, Tiffany finds it difficult to break the cycle of depressed eating when her two roommates don't join her diet and leave the house every day for work.

programme.title: Movie: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: Several young women and men, from committed relationships and singles, try to understand the signals and the intentions of the other sex. A variety of situations and misunderstandings develop the truth about dating in the modern world.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Briana's Family Secret
programme.desc: Briana DeJesus finds out she has a secret teenage brother her world is turned upside down. Briana tries to create a bond with her brother but her family threatens to implode in the process.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Paul and Caitea
programme.desc: Paul met Caitea on Xbox and fell madly in love, but one day Caitea just disappeared. A decade later, Nev and Kamie help Paul find his first love. But what they find is one of the most shocking reveals in Catfish history.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Kylie and Kendall Jenner
programme.desc: Kendall and Kylie Jenner are 'Keeping Up With the Knormals,' dealing with 'Krazy Moms' and teaching Rob how to 'Kill The Kamera.'

programme.desc: A young girl panics at her birthday party and turns it into a show of pyrotechnics, a nervous groom spits out more than just an 'I Do', and an eggnog-soaked Santa Claus crashes a Christmas Party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bidder Loser
programme.desc: A passersby reaction to Sal burying his niece in the park, the rare outcome of a Joker vs. Joker challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The Jokers that are big pro wrestling fans, and how long it took Joe to recover from his Sumo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brownbeaten
programme.desc: The length it took Murr's eyebrows to grow back.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: The guys pose as crummy cashiers at a grocery store and then play with laser pointers at a mall. Plus, tonight's loser gets soaked with embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Murr's Farms Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a meal made entirely out of produce from Murr's backyard. Plus, Wayne Brady, the greatest improviser of all time, joins the conversation.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Childhood Meals Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe eat a childhood meal with Colin Jost. Plus, Sal fools his mom into thinking she owes 20% of her produce to the government.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Wait, My Chair!
programme.desc: Michael shows a caterer the true power of dairy products, and an antique store customer is stunned when a species of termite chews through the scenery.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Speed Thieves
programme.desc: Michael adds spice to lunch at a diner, and at a furniture store, he shows his co-worker that impossible things can happen in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Impractically Carbonaro Jokers Effect
programme.desc: Four very impractical assistants invade a coffee bar to help Michael stun customers, but they quickly discover the joke is on them.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: A Similar Rock Energy
programme.desc: Michael is back in Chicago hashing out new ideas at a hemp store, inspecting spooky churches and teaming up with special guest star, Jack Black.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Baggage Shame

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Quantum Mock-anics

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened

programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Pantry Faves
programme.desc: It's a quiet weekend for Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, on the farm, so Molly's making an inexpensive lunch using her favorite pantry ingredients. She starts with harissa-braised chickpeas with feta and adds yogurt marinated chicken skewers.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Pizza Friday
programme.desc: It's Pizza Friday on the farm, and Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, are hosting friends for dinner. Molly's making two pizzas using the same delicious dough recipe: sausage and kale pizza and squash and ricotta pizza with fresh squash from the farm.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Ladies Who Brunch
programme.desc: Molly shares her favourite meal of the day with some of her favourite friends from Grand Fords, N.D. She's making them a brunch feast that includes a mini kale shakshuka, a sweet potato and bacon hash and her make ahead baked challah French toast.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Book Club Party
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is hosting book club on the farm. She makes walnut-crusted brie mac and cheese, succulent skillet pork chops with salsa verde, squash and apple salad with mustardy dressing and, for dessert, Dakota-style plum cakes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Just Me and the Girls
programme.desc: The guys are away and so it's 24 hours of just Ree Drummond and the girls. She's whipping up a blueberry crumb cake for breakfast while they play with the new puppies. For dinner its petite filets with wasabi cilantro cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Other Cuts Of Beef
programme.desc: Ree's transforming random cuts of beef into four delicious dishes. She's turning stew beef into slow cooker Sunday stew and serving it with fabulous buttery parsley lemon noodles.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cheap And Easy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has been stocking up for four make-ahead meals that are as cheap as they are easy to make. There's inexpensive slow cooker teriyaki ribs with quick slaw, Tex-Mex meatballs, BBQ chicken baked potatoes and a cheesy rigatoni pepper bake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Waste Not, Want Not
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is reclaiming kitchen scraps and transforming them into star dishes. Peels, stems and bones destined for the trash are instead turned into crispy roasted potato peels, stir fried broccoli stems and an awesome all-purpose chicken broth.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Oh Boy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking for her permanently hungry teenage sons. First, she makes buffalo chicken totchos that are a blend of potato tots, nachos and wings.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Underappreciated
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shines a spotlight on unsung hero ingredients. Canned foods reveal hidden talents in her Salmon burgers and spam fried rice. Then Ree uses a freezer star in a spinach mushroom quiche, and a baking mix takes the lead in chocolate chip scones.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Blogger Battle
programme.desc: Four of America's hottest food bloggers go head to head in a culinary battle worth up to $20,000. "Between two buns," tacos without taco ingredients, and a "trending dinner" are the challenges.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Food Wheel Free-For-All
programme.desc: The chefs are taking a big spin around the market with three rounds of Food Wheel games! First, chefs spin the budget wheel to win a paltry $9.04 for their pork dish.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Hidden Party Zone
programme.desc: Lucas takes on the nearly impossible challenge to transform a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious, five-star resort-worthy pool space, hiding its secret identity as the ultimate sports and party fanatic's entertainment zone.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Deeper Dive: Pools of Paradise
programme.desc: The crew is determined to design a Costa Rican-inspired jungle for a Florida family's backyard. Later, Lucas builds a Mediterranean-inspired mini resort with a Caribbean twist, including the ultimate outdoor gym space.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Builds: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Discover France's fantastical structures that redefine what a treehouse can be. In Scandinavia, explore a treetop bed and breakfast, experience nature at a forester's custom homes, and see how the Arctic Circle's sky-high Treehouse Hotel stays afloat.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Deeper Dive: Pools of Paradise
programme.desc: The crew is determined to design a Costa Rican-inspired jungle for a Florida family's backyard. Later, Lucas builds a Mediterranean-inspired mini resort with a Caribbean twist, including the ultimate outdoor gym space.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Builds: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Discover France's fantastical structures that redefine what a treehouse can be. In Scandinavia, explore a treetop bed and breakfast, experience nature at a forester's custom homes, and see how the Arctic Circle's sky-high Treehouse Hotel stays afloat.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Hidden Party Zone
programme.desc: Lucas takes on the nearly impossible challenge to transform a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious, five-star resort-worthy pool space, hiding its secret identity as the ultimate sports and party fanatic's entertainment zone.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens
programme.desc: The remarkable story of three adorable kitten litters coming of age. From unsteady first steps to daring kitty pounces, the first eights weeks of their lives will be an epic journey for these adventurous Abyssinians, brash Bengals and pefect Persians.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Four Blind Cats
programme.desc: Jackson must rescue Meki and Megan from their cycle of co-dependency before they're both kicked out of Megan's parent's place. Jackson tutors a bouncer on how to handle his sweet Tasmanian devil of a cat and a couple shelters special needs cats.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Tiger Eyes
programme.desc: It's a big day for Hunter the Sumatran Tiger. He is blind and must be sedated for his annual eye check, allowing Terri to get closer than usual. The keepers prepare the young giraffe Scarlett for a road trip to South Australia, reuniting her with family.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Mate for Life
programme.desc: The health and love life of Chester's Penguin Island's oldest penguin could be in jeopardy. One of the zoo's most dangerous families is on the move and keepers prepare to welcome two orphan sun bears to the zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Moving Day
programme.desc: The Zoo's huge male sea lion is in rut, and staff need to move the younger males before he comes territorial. The veterinary team come up with an ingenious solution to repair Dinky the Flamingo's broken ankle. And feeding a rock python proves challenging.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Canopy Clubhouse
programme.desc: With a budget as high as the trees, a family in Bedford, NY hires Pete to design a dream clubhouse for the entire family. With a big BBQ patio, a living room and a lofted chalkboard covered playroom, Pete's surprise treehouse brings fun for all ages.

programme.title: Tanked!: A Guiding Light to Fitness
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett get physical when they build a multi-activity tank for a fitness mogul.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Giving Back
programme.desc: Two stray pit bulls hiding beneath a two-ton stack of lumber lure Tia into a dramatic and potentially deadly rescue.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Puppy-Palooza
programme.desc: Tia comes face to face with a protective mother and her litter of seven puppies. New parolee William must step up to keep control of all the rowdy pups at Villalobos.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm Before the Storm
programme.desc: Across Texas, boating and fishing patrols are interrupted by record storms and flooding. Near Austin, Search and Rescue teams save multiple people from dangerous swift water and tornadoes. Wardens chase a felon with an illegal gun in East Texas.

programme.title: Movie: Madea Goes to Jail
programme.desc: Grandma Madea is mischievous and impulsive with a few anger control issues. After a high-speed chase and appearing in front of a judge, she finds herself in jail with a variety of interesting characters.

programme.title: Movie: Why Did I Get Married Too?
programme.desc: Four couples reflect on the past year of their marriages while on their annual vacation. Their holiday is interrupted when an ex-husband arrives with the intention of winning back his remarried wife.

programme.title: Movie: The Family That Preys
programme.desc: Two families of different backgrounds have to learn to work together despite the odds against them.

programme.title: Martin: Martin Gets Paid
programme.desc: While auditioning for a TV show, Martin learns that he needs an audition tape. Although the tape doesn't turn out as planned, Martin is offered a job he can't refuse.

programme.title: Martin: Break Up to Make Up
programme.desc: Martin tries to spend more time with Gina to help their relationship, but Gina is busy.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Field of Streams
programme.desc: After a nostalgic flashback to the glory days as his high school's baseball all-star, Cleveland visits his alma mater to find out there's no longer a team. Principal Wally gives Cleveland one week to raise money to rebuild the stadium.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Love Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Roberta's new teacher, Ms. Eck, encourages Roberta to alter her appearance to teach her an important lesson. Cleveland Jr. befriends the disguised Roberta, only to fall in love with her.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Our Gang
programme.desc: Coach Cleveland comes to the rescue of frustrated parents by taking a group of delinquent teens under his wing. With the help of Cleveland Jr., he creates a new club dubbed The Crazy Eights, and hopes that it will keep the kids on the right track.

programme.title: Martin: The Closer I Get to You
programme.desc: As a last-minute fill in, Martin starts giving love advice on the show.

programme.title: Martin: Movin' on In
programme.desc: Martin and Gina move back in together, but there are too many belongings to fit.

programme.title: The Parkers: Kimberlale
programme.desc: After Kim unveils her new creations, they catch the attention of a boutique owner.

programme.title: The Parkers: Quarantine
programme.desc: Nikki and Kim's vacation in Mexico is ruined when they are kicked out of the country.

programme.title: The Parkers: And the Band Plays On
programme.desc: Kim's feathers are ruffled when T invites a beautiful Latin singer to join the band.

programme.title: The Parkers: Betting on Love
programme.desc: Nikki's ex-fiance walks back into her life with a promise to give up his gambling habit.

programme.title: House of Payne: House of Awkward
programme.desc: C.J. is offered a promotion, making him Janine and Roland's boss. Curtis finds a bag of weed in an old box of his while packing, and Floyd smokes the weed. Calvin asks Curtis to babysit and Curtis ends up babysitting Christian and Floyd.

programme.title: House of Payne: A Mother's Payne
programme.desc: Ella's mother comes to visit. Meanwhile, Janine texts C.J. a sexy picture of herself.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Blood Is Thicker Than Mud
programme.desc: Will and Carlton are given humiliating jobs as part of their initiation into a fraternity.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Fresh Prince After Dark

programme.desc: Voight calls the team to investigate a homicide involving the only witness in a rape and murder case against an extremely young man. Intelligence investigates the accused's family to see if someone was paid to take out the victim.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Shot Heard Round the World
programme.desc: After two officers are murdered by a highly trained and knowledgeable killer, Voight struggles to keep the case contained. At the same time, Lindsay confronts Antonio about his new job.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Bury This Case
programme.desc: Severide is brought in for questioning after his car is found to have caused a deadly accident. As the investigation gets underway, the team uncovers a group of car-jackers may be the key to Severide's innocence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Read the News
programme.desc: After the body of a young woman is found with multiple gunshot wounds, Intelligence discovers this case may be connected with several other cases, and they uncover a serial killer is working in Chicago.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Wish
programme.desc: When a mutilated sex offender is found dead, it is unclear if he was the victim of a crime. As intelligence questions those related to the case, they find themselves up against a special police force that may be covering up illegal activities.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sanctuary
programme.desc: After a female jogger is brutally murdered in the park, Rixton and Atwater arrive to find two suspects fleeing the scene. When the men enter a church, the priest blocks the police from entering the building.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: I Remember Her Now
programme.desc: The body of a young girl is found crushed in an abandoned building after she runs away from a treatment centre for troubled girls. Voight sends Halstead to work undercover inside the centre, where he believes something shady is happening.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Seven Indictments
programme.desc: When a charred body is found in a torched house, Intelligence must work to identify the victim, as well as a young boy who is found badly injured inside. As they work towards identifying the victim, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Favor, Affection, Malice or Ill-Will
programme.desc: When Lindsay is tipped off about a grieving father looking to avenge his daughter's death, Olinsky goes undercover as a hitman-for-hire. Meanwhile, Ruzek comes back after finishing his undercover assignment, only to have Voight knock him down to patrol.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Emotional Proximity
programme.desc: Olinsky's daughter remains in critical condition following a massive fire, leaving Intelligence on edge, but more determined than ever to track down the suspect.

programme.title: Monster Preacher: Monster Preacher
programme.desc: In 1986, self-proclaimed pastor, Gary Heidnik, kidnapped, tortured and raped six women in Philadelphia, brutally murdering two. In this special, hear from two of the victims themselves as they recount the horrors of surviving the monster preacher.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Mirinda Boob & Ron Heichel
programme.desc: A wife and mother seeks attention outside her marriage and triggers a deadly chain of events.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Keri Murphy & Rebecca Keller
programme.desc: Two teen lovers fall under suspicion when someone close to them meets a deadly end.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Tammy Holman & Charlie Miller
programme.desc: A lonely man longing for affection finds the attention he needs in an unlikely person...but his desire has lethal ramifications.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake: Out of the Darkness
programme.desc: The body of Kathy Blair, a choir director, is found stabbed to death in her bedroom in Austin, Texas. The gruesome crime scene puzzles investigators until an unlikely clue captured in the darkness puts them on the trail of a depraved killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Nancy Khan
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a successful business manager and expecting father leads Texas detectives to a seedy underworld and a spiteful killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Debra Dillard
programme.desc: A young mother of two on her way to a birthday party is gunned down on the side of a rural highway. The ensuing investigation reveals fraying within a tight-knit family.

programme.title: Snapped: Janice Dodson
programme.desc: A newlyweds hunting trip becomes lethal when a woman finds her husband shot dead, sending investigators to track a muddy trail of bullet holes, deception, and dirty laundry left by a devious murderer.

programme.title: Snapped: Cynthia Alvarez
programme.desc: As Halloween approaches in southern California, a family of three mysteriously goes missing. During their search for answers, investigators unearth a haunting message that points to murder.

programme.title: Movie: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Legendary showman P.T. Barnum launches his iconic and legendary circus and museum, assembling a collection of performers, oddities, animals and outcasts to create the greatest show on Earth, succeeding despite countless doubters and setbacks.

programme.title: The Simpsons: He Loves to Fly and He D'ohs
programme.desc: After Homer saves Mr. Burns from drowning, Burns thanks him by taking him on a whirlwind trip to Chicago on his private plane. After returning home, Homer makes it his mission to find a job that offers him the chance to fly on a corporate jet.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer of Seville
programme.desc: Mr. Burns hires Homer to sing the lead in his production of 'La Bohème.' Homer wows the crowd and escapes a mob of crazed fans with the help of a mysterious woman who seems a little too concerned with Homer's well being.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Midnight Towboy
programme.desc: Feeling that Maggie is getting too clingy, Marge hires a counsellor to teach her to become more independent. Meanwhile, Homer gets a little too carried away with his new job as a tow truck driver.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Don't Wanna Know Why the Caged Bird Sings
programme.desc: Marge convinces a bank robber, Dwight, to turn himself over to the police by promising to visit him in prison. When Marge fails to keep her promise, Dwight escapes to find her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVIII
programme.desc: The fright fest begins in 'Mr. and Mrs. Simpson' as Homer and Marge leave for what appears to be an ordinary day. But Homer is living a double life as a secret agent, and he is assigned to eliminate Kent Brockman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Little Orphan Millie
programme.desc: When Milhouse's parents are lost at sea and presumed dead, his new orphan status makes him cooler than Bart. Meanwhile, Homer gets himself in hot water when he can't remember the colour of Marge's eyes.

programme.title: Family Guy: Send in Stewie, Please
programme.desc: Stewie gets sent to see his school's child psychologist, Dr. Cecil Pritchfield, for a surprising session, which causes Stewie to reveal major, never-before-told secrets about himself.

programme.title: Family Guy: V Is for Mystery
programme.desc: In a special Dickensian-themed episode, Stewie and Brian are detectives who embark on solving a string of mysterious murders set in Victorian-era London.

programme.title: Family Guy: Veteran Guy
programme.desc: After Peter and the guys get caught pretending to be military veterans and are found guilty of the Stolen Valor Act, a judge sentences them to join the U.S. Coast Guard.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Woof of Wall Street
programme.desc: Brian convinces Stewie to teach him how to invest in the stock market after learning Stewie has a knack for making money from it. Meanwhile, Peter, Quagmire, Cleveland and Joe look after the Drunken Clam while Jerome is away.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Yurty Rotten Scoundrels
programme.desc: When Gayle decides to host an artists' workshop in a yurt with only one attendee, Linda feels compelled to go to support her sister. Meanwhile, Louise and Gene lead a covert operation to find a lost cat for a cash reward.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Flat-Top O' the Morning to Ya
programme.desc: Bob and the kids help a down-on-his-luck restaurant owner, while Linda and Teddy get carried away with St. Patrick's Day festivities.

programme.title: Archer: A Going Concern
programme.desc: After Malory is wiped out in a Ponzi scheme, she hatches a scheme of her own: selling ISIS-lock, stock and snack machines to archrival spy agency ODIN.

programme.title: Archer: Blood Test
programme.desc: Archer is in for a huge surprise when his favourite call girl, Trinette, shows up at ISIS with a bouncing baby boy on her hip and a subpoena for a paternity test in her purse.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Squashes Their Beefs
programme.desc: After Frank appears on local television advocating gun ownership, the rest of the gang takes a look at the ownership process and alternatives to find a common ground on this still heated issue.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Beats Boggs
programme.desc: Mac oversees the gang while they compete to break Wade Boggs’ legendary beer drinking record.

programme.title: Movie: The Greatest Showman

programme.title: Madagascar: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: The narrow eastern strip of the island is rich in life; travel from the highest mountains, where trees are few, to lush rainforests, to the tropical coast, home to ring-tailed lemurs, jewelled geckos and predatory wasps.

programme.title: Madagascar: Land of Heat and Dust
programme.desc: Some of the strategies for survival in Madagascar's dry south are ingenious.

programme.title: Africa: Kalahari
programme.desc: In Africa's ancient southwest corner, two deserts sit side by side; water is in short supply, yet these deserts are full of life because the creatures that live there have turned the rules of survival on their head.

programme.title: Africa: Savannah
programme.desc: East Africa is a land that is constantly changing. In order to survive, creatures must be able to deal with twists and turns, no matter how hostile and unpredictable. This unique and varied land is a haven for life.

programme.desc: The Congo rainforest covers the very heart of Africa and is a dynamic and pulsating habitat, packed with life. From the competitive centre of the forest to the open edge of the Atlantic Ocena, this is all about carving out space in a crowded world.

programme.title: Africa: Cape
programme.desc: Two great ocean currents, one cold and one warm, sweep around the continent's Great Cape.

programme.title: Africa: Sahara
programme.desc: North Africa is home to the greatest desert on Earth, the Sahara. This vast wilderness is the toughest part of the African continent.

programme.title: Africa: Cape

programme.title: Africa: Sahara
programme.desc: North Africa is home to the greatest desert on Earth, the Sahara. This vast wilderness is the toughest part of the African continent.

programme.title: Madagascar: Island of Marvels
programme.desc: Examine clues from Madagascar's animals, plants and landscape to discover how the island's past has produced its present; the Tsingy have cut off animals in isolated gorges allowing them to evolve unique species.

programme.title: Madagascar: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: The narrow eastern strip of the island is rich in life; travel from the highest mountains, where trees are few, to lush rainforests, to the tropical coast, home to ring-tailed lemurs, jewelled geckos and predatory wasps.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: South America
programme.desc: A look at the most species rich continent on Earth: South America. In the Andes, pumas hunt guanaco while rarely seen bears search for mini avocados. In the Amazon, poison dart frogs care for their babies and colourful macaws eat clay.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Australia
programme.desc: A land cast adrift at the time of the dinosaurs. Here, kangaroos and wombats brave snowstorms and gum tree forests are filled with never-before-seen predators.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe
programme.desc: Europe is where wildlife survives alongside people. In Gibraltar, a baby monkey is kidnapped, while in the cemeteries of Vienna grave robbing wild hamsters fight. In this fairy tale continent wolves roam the forests and dragons lurk in caves.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: Only the strong can survive in Antarctica, the world's most hostile continent. Elephant seals battle for territories, king penguins gather in colonies, and great whales feast on krill bait.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Africa
programme.desc: Even in Africa, home of the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth, wildlife faces many challenges.

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Islands
programme.desc: How the South Pacific islands has affected human culture.

programme.title: South Pacific: Castaways
programme.desc: Learn how some of the most isolated islands became habited.

programme.title: South Pacific: Endless Blue
programme.desc: Much of the South Pacific is a marine desert, but some areas support diverse life. Following how the ocean creatures survive the harsh conditions they live in.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation: Over Thin Ice

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation: In the Blood

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Home-Wrecking Hounds
