programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Later, Gator!
programme.desc: A new sloth bear has major lung issues, and a gator breaks out of restraints in an exam.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Polar Bear Palooza
programme.desc: The staff throws a polar bear party and Priya works with her husband on a shark exam.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Oakley Get Your Blow Gun
programme.desc: Another hard winter is on its way to the Yukon. Dr. Oakley wants her daughter to learn the ways of animal care before the snow gets too high.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Wild West
programme.desc: The gunfight at Tombstone's OK Corral turned Wyatt Earp into an American folk hero, and to find what really happened here, experts use the newest tech to discover what caused the fatal shootout and what it reveals about the dark secrets of the Wild West.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Volcano Temple
programme.desc: The Pantheon is a 2,000-year-old temple with a dark secret; today, using cutting-edge archaeological methods and brand-new evidence, experts look beneath the streets of Rome to find out why it was built and how it survived so long.

programme.title: Unearthed: Terror in the Torture Tower
programme.desc: Decoding the mysteries behind iconic structures and monuments around the world.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures
programme.desc: The treasures of Ramses II are found at Abu Simbel, a giant temple carved into a desert cliff over 3,000 years ago, and new discoveries at this marvel reveal the secrets of ancient Egypt's greatest pharaoh.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Special sneak peek of the new season of Mysteries of the Abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the First Pyramids
programme.desc: Origins of the first known human civilizations are all mysteriously interconnected with the construction of pyramids; using pioneering archaeological methods and advanced tech, experts investigate the purpose behind these remarkable ancient structures.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Viking Confidential
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard need to find more artifacts to support their case, so they arrange to meet a mysterious man with knowledge of the runestone at a secret location where he has something important to show them.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the First Pyramids
programme.desc: Origins of the first known human civilizations are all mysteriously interconnected with the construction of pyramids; using pioneering archaeological methods and advanced tech, experts investigate the purpose behind these remarkable ancient structures.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Viking Confidential
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard need to find more artifacts to support their case, so they arrange to meet a mysterious man with knowledge of the runestone at a secret location where he has something important to show them.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Hunt for Flight MH370
programme.desc: Since 2014, the fate of Malaysia Airlines flight MH370 has remained a mystery. It's still unclear if it crashed, and if it did, the wreckage has yet to be found.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: The Roanoke colony vanished without a trace, and centuries later, it remains one of history's greatest unsolved mysteries. But new evidence might at last reveal its fate. After a man is swallowed by the earth, experts wonder if a sinkhole is to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Secrets at the Great Wall
programme.desc: The Great Wall of China is one of the world's greatest engineering marvels, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge construction to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Doomsday in Venice
programme.desc: Venice is a city in crisis and it took dangerous, cutting-edge engineering to build it. As apocalyptic floodwaters unleash havoc, experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Fortress of the Gods
programme.desc: Rome's Pantheon hides the secret to the Roman Empire's power, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge engineering to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Ghosts of the Colosseum
programme.desc: Rome's Colosseum is the most famous stadium on the planet, and it took cutting-edge engineering and a fallen emperor to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Rise of the Aqueducts
programme.desc: Rome's aqueducts are one of the greatest engineering marvels in history, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge construction to build them. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building them a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Hunt for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: According to the Bible, Noah's Ark was a world-changing engineering feat, and it took cutting-edge construction to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Secrets in the Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Great Pyramid is one of the world's greatest and most mysterious marvels, and using cutting-edge tech and the latest engineering innovations, experts reveal what it would take to build the ancient wonder today.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Strings Attached
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Chuck Rock meets Beth Williams in Tampa, Florida. When the relationship turns sour, Chuck finds himself drawn into a puzzling web of intrigue and danger and becomes the target of a mysterious stranger.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Needs Enemies
programme.desc: A cold morning in December starts off like any other until a rural farmer discovers the body of a dead woman. What seems like a sadistic rape and murder turns into a conspiracy and before long the diabolical nature of someone close is revealed.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: A storm rattles the night in Key Largo, Florida, as an intruder slips silently into the home of newlyweds Michael and Missy MacIvor. As daylight clears away the rain, a nightmare is revealed that will haunt the entire community for years to come.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Winter's Nightmare
programme.desc: An entire family vanishes in the dead of winter from Nebraska. Have they suddenly decided to skip town, or has something far worse happened? A daughter's relentless search helps cops uncover a sinister and deadly plot fueled by revenge and greed.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: High School Horror
programme.desc: When the body of beautiful high school student Debbie Gama is discovered in a creek wrapped in wire, the ensuing investigation ends up uncovering more than her murderer, revealing a secret world of twisted sex, drugs, sadomasochism and bondage.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Sinner and The Saint
programme.desc: When a troubled young man befriends Jessica Vega via social media, the kind-hearted college student and single mom does her best to steer him towards a better path. Unfortunately, her good intentions will eventually come back to haunt her.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Mother of It All
programme.desc: A lively slumber party turns into a nightmare when a loving mother, Dianne Watts, her young daughter, and her daughter's friend, are murdered. The town of McMinnville is turned upside down, knowing there is a killer amongst them.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Gone Girls
programme.desc: In July, 2018, 25-year-old Danniella Vian, a young mother from Mobile, Alabama, disappears into thin air. And then 19-year-old Holly Moore's suspicious death still raises questions four years after her body is found hanging from her closet.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Sinner and The Saint
programme.desc: When a troubled young man befriends Jessica Vega via social media, the kind-hearted college student and single mom does her best to steer him towards a better path. Unfortunately, her good intentions will eventually come back to haunt her.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Mother of It All
programme.desc: A lively slumber party turns into a nightmare when a loving mother, Dianne Watts, her young daughter, and her daughter's friend, are murdered. The town of McMinnville is turned upside down, knowing there is a killer amongst them.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Gone Girls
programme.desc: In July, 2018, 25-year-old Danniella Vian, a young mother from Mobile, Alabama, disappears into thin air. And then 19-year-old Holly Moore's suspicious death still raises questions four years after her body is found hanging from her closet.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: High School Horror
programme.desc: When the body of beautiful high school student Debbie Gama is discovered in a creek wrapped in wire, the ensuing investigation ends up uncovering more than her murderer, revealing a secret world of twisted sex, drugs, sadomasochism and bondage.

programme.title: Breaking Homicide: Lost in the Woods
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Judy Rawlings vanished in 2001 after a midnight ride with a friend, her body found hidden in the woods weeks later.

programme.title: Breaking Homicide: The Killer in My Bed
programme.desc: In 1996, beloved teacher Norma Luobikis was found, stabbed to death, in her home. Evidence suggests an intimate bond between the victim and her killer.

programme.title: Real Detective: Puppet Master
programme.desc: A young woman fails to return to her home in Boulder, CO and is later found decapitated. Detective Steve Ainsworth soon learns that she was part of a mysterious Apostolic church group, led by a pastor who has a reputation for preying on the weak.

programme.title: Real Detective: Angel Doe
programme.desc: We've all heard of John Doe. This is the case of Angel Doe - a little girl found dead in a ditch near the Houston Bayou, that no one has reported missing. Investigator Clarence Douglas promises he won't neglect her in death, like she was in life.

programme.title: Redrum: The Girl in the Shower
programme.desc: Jayme Austin is a loving mother living in the Oregon countryside. When she doesn't show up for work one morning, the community begins a search but investigators fear the worst. As they look into her past, they find many possible motives and suspects.

programme.title: Redrum: Betting the Farm
programme.desc: Sabina Kulakowski is a dedicated social worker in Auburn, New York. Her office has been receiving threats recently so police are not too surprised when her body is found near her home. Is this an open and shut case or are there more layers to this story?

programme.title: Redrum: O Come All Ye Unfaithful
programme.desc: Dan and Donna Arnold were living the American dream; Dan was the Youth and Music Minister at their church, Donna played the church organ. It appeared they had it all, but hidden desires culminate in a shocking murder in their church parking lot.

programme.title: Redrum: Ding-Dong, You're Dead
programme.desc: John Cataneo was a devoted father and loving husband. This successful business owner had a gruff exterior but a heart of gold, he was always trying to help others however he could. But one day, John's trusting nature would become his undoing...

programme.title: Motives & Murders: A Sister's Promise
programme.desc: When the mutilated body of 17-year-old Lori Billingsley is found in a ditch on the outskirts of town, it's obvious a sadistic killer is on the loose in Oregon. But when the case goes cold, it's her sister who's determined to get justice for Lori.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Deadly Forest
programme.desc: In 1985, a popular high school girl is found murdered in the Angeles National Forest. Investigators run through a network of a classmates, rivals, and troublemakers to find her killer. Years later, a break in the cases exposes the shocking truth.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: Long Arm of the Law
programme.desc: When two unrelated murders are traced to a violent pair of siblings, investigators are led on a wild goose chase, across two countries. It's a case that will consume not only the Tyler and Smith County authorities, but the U.S. Marshals and FBI.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Thirty-one year old Nikki McPhatter is a self-made success story Navy veteran and MBA graduate with a close circle of friends. She's only missing love. When she disappears, detectives follow a trail that leads them into the dark lair of a killer.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: The Crossroads
programme.desc: When a warm-hearted waitress is gunned down in a carjacking gone wrong, Detective McFadden must work fast. But this manhunt will last many years.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: The Boogie Man
programme.desc: When two young children bear witness to the gruesome murder of their mother, Demery makes it his personal mission to bring the killer to justice. He quickly zeroes in on two suspects, but can't escape the feeling that he's barking up the wrong tree.

programme.title: Civil War Conspiracies
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: American Nazis
programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Blackout Killers
programme.desc: Two serial killers take advantage of the blackouts in Nazi Germany and Britain that were meant to defend against enemy bombing.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County
programme.desc: On a bloodstained frontier where corruption is king, an unlikely hero becomes a crusader for justice and revenge. By the time of his death at the age of 21, everyone in the country had heard of Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Glacier River Cabin
programme.desc: A young couple leave the Air Force to build a cabin and start a new life in Alaska. With only three weeks to make it ready before winter, they call in family and friends to help. Follow their journey as they endure the elements and handcraft their home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Lighthouse
programme.desc: After witnessing the demise of Casco Bay's Halfway Rock lighthouse, Ford Reiche has the chance to return this icon to its former glory. It will take barges full of scaffolding, masons, and the cooperation of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Volcano Home
programme.desc: A couple builds a rainforest retreat within the edge of an active volcano on Hawaii's Big Island.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.title: Grand Designs: Unbelievable Builds: Modern Meets Historic
programme.desc: Lori and Maugan are building a unique, modern home in one of the most historic suburbs in Melbourne, Australia. The house features quirky elements, including a trapeze net, underground car-parking stacker and a 10-foot paper plane garden structure.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yellowstone River
programme.desc: The Lighthiser family sets out to build their dream home overlooking the Yellowstone River. Follow their journey as the activists and adventurers battle the elements to construct an uber-efficient house in a windswept valley in southwestern Montana.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Byrd Log Cabin
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs team returns to a previously salvaged house to save its original log structure. Mike and Tay also learn how that wood is milled for a custom building project. Mike uses that same wood to build an end table for the property owner.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Here We Go Again
programme.desc: After MJ and Lisa's wedding, smooth sailing is wishful thinking as Mike and MJ are welcomed back to the river house by a river of muck. The deck posts and windows get installed as they rush to get the house closed in before the winter weather arrives.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: River House of Dreams
programme.desc: Designer Sarah Richardson is back at the country house with some valuable advice on the design of the master en-suite. Meanwhile at the suburban house, the guys use some cool technology to improve the home's energy efficiency.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Smart Suburban Holmes
programme.desc: With the interior of the river house complete, it's time to focus on the suburban home as the open house date is fast approaching. Mike, MJ and the crew work feverishly to get the smart home ready and receive the valuation they're hoping to earn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Thousand Goodbyes
programme.desc: Flooring takes center stage inside the country house, while outside the barn is finally completed. The river house gets its finishing touches as Mike and MJ prepare to say goodbye to the Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Holmes Stretch
programme.desc: The first property that Mike Holmes and his son, MJ, bought is the last to be finished. Time is money, and there's still a ton of work to be done before they can put the sign up on the lawn.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Grandma's Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys save the logs from a fire-damaged home in West Virginia. Mark promises the family who sold him the cabin that he will honor their history here. Once the logs are salvaged, the cabin is rebuilt on the Boneyard for a client in Montana.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Boneyard Makeover
programme.desc: The team transforms the Boneyard by enclosing part of their shed with walls so they can work year-round, finishing off their new workspace by covering one wall with multi-colored barn wood.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Sweet Home Louisiana
programme.desc: The guys transform a timber frame barn into a modern home for an architect in Louisiana.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Digger's Cabin: The Whole Story
programme.desc: This one-hour special follows the whole story of how the Barnwood Builders transformed Digger's cabin into David's dream home, from a muddy take-down in West Virginia to a tricky build in Texas, and a remarkable finished result.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smokin' Sides and Sweets
programme.desc: No cookout is complete without some outrageous side dishes and craveworthy desserts, so Roger Mooking is putting the main course aside to honor everything that tops off the best barbecue meals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Top 5 BBQ Between Bread
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is letting barbecue pork sandwiches hog the spotlight.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Insane Inventions
programme.desc: Roger Mooking says goodbye to the standard grill and celebrates the most elaborate, over-the-top smokers and roasters.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pit Bosses
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is honoring the legendary pitmasters who make some of the country's best barbecue.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Queens
programme.desc: Stoke strongman Eddie Hall visits cosmopolitan Queens, NY, to make a solo attempt at a huge Greek kebab banquet, sample the best Chinese dumplings and try his hand at baseball.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Key Largo
programme.desc: Stoke strongman Eddie Hall lands in Florida Keys, to attempt a conch-fritter eating record, do some serious big-game fishing and try what's billed as the best Key Lime Pie on earth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Houston, TX
programme.desc: Casey two-steps down to Houston, Texas, for some tex-mex tastiness, including a colossal 22-ounce chicken-fried steak and the ultimate spicy challenge: a burger topped with seven of the world's hottest chile peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Detroit, Michigan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventure brings him to Detroit for the famous Detroit-style, Sicilian square pan pizza.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cleveland, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food frenzy brings him to Cleveland, Ohio, for a corned beef colossus, a caramel ice cream sundae at a sweet time machine and an Olympic-sized gyro in the Greek Village Grille's Mount Olympus Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manhattan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek brings him to Manhattan for historic pizza-by-the-slice, a transcendent take on an Old World baked good and over five pounds of undefeated dessert in the Giant Ice Cream Scoop Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC
programme.desc: Adam's hunger takes him to Washington, DC, to 'Horace and Dickie's' and 'Ben's Chilli Bowl'.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Family Feast

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tahiti

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Nova Scotia

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Pizza Party

programme.desc: Explore the world with dinosaur friends in search of the biggest dino of them all!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Who Let the Moths In? / Commander Meow
programme.desc: The moths infiltrate HQ, and Gekko won’t admit that he let them in until it is too late. Catboy realizes that a true Cat Explorer puts his team before the discovery.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Cheetah Chase / Training Daze
programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: Vampirina: Vampire for President/ Where's Wolfie?
programme.desc: Vampirina decides to run for class president! Poppy wants a pet bunny, but first she has to show her mom she's ready to have a pet by looking after Wolfie.

programme.title: Toon Bops: Happy Horse
programme.desc: A happy horse adventures around a little boy's house running around making all kinds of mischief.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Captain Rolly/ The Coolest Dogs in Town
programme.desc: Bob takes Bingo and Rolly to a 'Captain Dog!' event where the pugs get to be heroes for a day. The pups try to find ways to keep Bob cool on a hot summer day.

programme.title: Bluey: Bob Bilby / Spygame / Takeaway
programme.desc: Bingo brings home a Bob Bilby puppet; Bluey and Bingo play a spy game in the park; Bluey and her family have to wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Stop That Spinosaurus! / The Spookasaurus
programme.desc: A rampaging dinosaur threatens to cause havoc. When Jon gets spooked by a campfire story about a legendary dinosaur, he doesn't want to admit it to Miguel and Min.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Duck, Duck, Dog / Mr. Bob Goes to Washington
programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug
programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Close Encounters of a Pug Kind/ History Mystery
programme.desc: When Bob wants to meet someone from space, the pugs go to a gathering of UFO enthusiasts. When the pups find a doggie toy that isn't theirs, they go on a mission to find its owner.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Case of the Royal Scarf / The Case of the Missing Bicycle
programme.desc: When the special scarf Priya designed for the Queen goes missing, it's up to Mira to help find it! Mira juggles babysitting her cousin and searching for a missing bike.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Far Far From Home / Toy Trouble
programme.desc: Freddy can’t fall asleep on their first overnight delivery and worries that he won’t get the rest he needs! Pip and Freddy show Mia the joys of giving away her old toys.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: A Good Case of the Hiccups / Stuck Up
programme.desc: Emmie's toy microphone starts to skip and repeat so Doc diagnoses her with 'Repeatitis'. Doc cleans the sand out of toy tractor Riggo so he can move his scooper up and down again.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Pug-scape/ Luck of the Pug-ish
programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Double Doggie Dare!/ Empire State of Mind
programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Twin Henrys
programme.desc: Henry refuses to miss an MMA fight, so sends an android in his place to a family dinner.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Ox Pox
programme.desc: Captain Man must travel back in time to the 1700s to find a cure after Piper gets a mysterious illness.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Love Muffin
programme.desc: When Captain Man suddenly announces he's getting married, Henry and Charlotte go searching for answers only to discover that things are not as they seem.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Dog Day After-School
programme.desc: Desperate to get their mom's tablet back after it is confiscated at school, Billy and Nora get help from Phoebe, who wants to prove she can be as sneaky as Max.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Aunt Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe give their mom the ultimate birthday surprise by tracking down her long lost sister, but the gift goes awry when they discover these sisters have been feuding for years.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Back to School
programme.desc: After going back to their elementary school to complete a hero assessment exam, Phoebe and Max realize passing a fifth grade test won't be easy when the instructor is a former classmate that Max tormented when they were younger.

programme.title: Danger Force: Ray Goes Cray
programme.desc: Two students keep Danger Force from going on missions, so Danger Force and Captain Man must use their powers to get the students to leave.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Mother May I
programme.desc: Dylan writes a serious rap about his mom, prompting Martin to read his diary to find out if he's doing ok. Dylan catches him in the act, triggering an escalating run of everyone invading the others' privacy.

programme.title: Danger Force: The Danger Force Awakens
programme.desc: Captain Man has a new crew of superhero sidekicks, Danger Force, but when he tells them there's a 'crime drought' in Swellview, they begin to suspect that he's fighting crime without them.

programme.title: The Loud House: Selfie Improvement/ No Place Like Homeschool
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: The Loud House: City Slickers/ Fool Me Twice
programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city. Lori struggles to be a city girl and Lincoln finds Ronnie Anne has changed.

programme.title: The Loud House: Net Gains/ Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Lynn desperately wants to win a basketball championship but gets drafted onto a terrible team. Mom and Dad are sick of waiting in the long bathroom line so they decide to build a secret bathroom.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fandom Pains/ Rita Her Rights
programme.desc: Lucy is annoyed that Lori and Leni have started watching her vampire show because of a cute new character. After getting community service for racking up tickets, Mom finds it's more relaxing than being at home.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: V.I.Peeved/ Señor Class
programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: The Loud House: Teacher's Union/ Head Poet's Anxiety
programme.desc: To try and make gym class better, Lincoln and Clyde set Coach Pacowski and Mrs. Johnson up. Luan mentors Lucy teaching her how to manage the ups and downs of pursuing a life in the arts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spin the Bottle/ There's a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jellyfish Hunter/ The Fry Cook Games
programme.desc: Customers love SpongeBob's jellyfish Krabby Patty. The fast food Olympics take place.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Club SpongeBob/ My Pretty Seahorse
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build a small clubhouse and tell Squid he can't join. Spongebob finds a stray sea horse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wet Painters/ Krusty Krab Training Video
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has SpongeBob and Patrick paint the inside of his house; training for employees.

programme.title: It's Pony: Game Horse/ Unicorn
programme.desc: Annie and Pony use their video game skills to save their endangered friends. Then, Pony thinks he's become a unicorn, so Annie uses him to raise money to save their sports court.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shanghaid/ Gary Takes a Bath
programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Just One Bite/ The Bully
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes obsessed with the idea that Squid must try a Krabby Patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karate Choppers
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Sandy's incessant Karate sparring is starting to wreak havoc in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Cabin in the Kelp/ The Hankering
programme.desc: The Gal Pals spend the weekend in a cabin in the woods.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Frozen Face Off
programme.desc: Everyone in Bikini Bottom is participating in a worm-sled race to the South Pole.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped
programme.desc: Bob and Patrick sneak inside Sandy's treedome while she's hibernating; Gary seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob, so Bob becomes jealous and buys other pets to get Gary back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: When it snows in Bikini Bottom, Spongebob and Pat go out and play in their forts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Algae's Always Greener/ Spongeguard on Duty
programme.desc: Plankton has a new invention that allows him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs. He is so excited because once he has Mr. Krabs' life, he will also have the Krabby Patty secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krab Borg/ Rock a Bye Bi-Valve
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes paranoid; Patrick finds a baby clam and decides to rear it as his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Unreal Estate/ Code Yellow
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he's allergic to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home. Squidward is getting a nose job at the local hospital, and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Munk vs. Machine/ Shack Magic
programme.desc: The Chipmunks and Chipettes compete in a dodgeball tournament but no-one expects Theo to be their secret weapon.The Chipmunks find a shack that magically fills with toys and games and wonder if it's magic or something more sinister.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Sick As A Chipmunk/ Instant Gram
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Toy/ Bloodlines
programme.desc: A favourite toy of Theodore's is lost on a rafting trip but then mysteriously shows up at the house. Alvin wants Dave to take a DNA test to see if he's a famous explorer or king, but maybe it's a person much scarier.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Food Fight/ Please Don't Feed the Turners
programme.desc: Timmy wishes Mom were the best chef in the world.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Operation Dinkelberg/ Spellementary School
programme.desc: Foop is back and trying to be the most popular kid at school.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy
programme.desc: A dim-witted dog is recruited into a super-secret crime-fighting organization.

programme.title: Back at the Barnyard
programme.desc: Otis and his friends have adventures while trying to protect the farm they live on.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Sheen's Brain
programme.desc: Jimmy turns his Brain Drain helmet into a Brain Gain helmet and uses it on his buddy, Sheen, instantly quadrupling Sheen's IQ.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Maternotron Knows/ Send in the Clones
programme.desc: Judy Neutron goes to a spa for a week, leaving Jimmy and Hugh to take care of the chores in her absence. Jimmy clones himself to complete a series of chores.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Adventures in Babysitting/ Alvin's Assistant
programme.desc: Theodore gets roped into doing Alvin's babysitting job with a spoiled four year old. Kevin agrees to be Alvin's assistant to get closer to the music industry, but ends up running errands instead.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Best in Shoe/ Royal Pain
programme.desc: To land the lead role in a play, Alvin wagers Brittany that he can remain in character as a shoe cobbler. When Brittany becomes convinced she's a long lost princess she carries her new royal status a little too far.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pirates Life/ World Record
programme.desc: When pirates show up at the house, the boys do all they can to protect a treasure chest that arrived for Dave. The Chipmunks and Chipettes compete to set a world record in hopes of winning a new virtual reality game.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Exchange Student/ Crystal Ball Birthday
programme.desc: When an exchange student comes to visit, he tells a scary story that make the chipmunks think Dave is in danger. Annie and Amber offer to plan Brittany's birthday party, pitting her against Jeanette and Eleanor in the process.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: A Chinatown Ghost Story
programme.desc: As Donnie becomes increasingly jealous of April and Casey's relationship, April is kidnapped by an evil spirit that intends to drain her powers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Into Dimension X!
programme.desc: At home, Mikey always messes things up, but when the Turtles go to the bizarre realm of Dimension X, he's the only one who can figure the place out.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Game On!
programme.desc: It's not all fun and games when Devon's favourite video game is brought to life in the form of a new Robotron.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Artist Anonymous
programme.desc: Ravi secretly repaints a local art mural, but a strange artist arrives and claims the work as his own.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Evil League of Mutants
programme.desc: Baron Draxum assembles of league of villains against the Turtles.

programme.title: It's Pony: Nosy Pony/ Beatrice
programme.desc: When Annie tries to stop Pony from being nosy, she creates a bigger problem that puts him in danger. When Annie takes pity on a lonely friend and lets her spend the day with Pony, she worries her friend is better at taking care of Pony than she is.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Party Puppers
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Operation Crumb Cake/ Mandace
programme.desc: Isabella sends a letter to Phineas admitting her true feelings, but instantly regrets her decision/ Doof invents an '-inator' to disguise himself as the local pizza delivery boy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Interview With a Platypus/ Tip of the Day
programme.desc: Animal translator built so the boys can figure out what Perry is really trying to say.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Undercover Carl/ Hip Hip Parade
programme.desc: When Carl intercepts blue prints for Phineas and Ferb's Anti-Gravity Fun Launcher, he mistakenly thinks that they are assisting Dr. Doofenshmirtz with an evil plan so Major Monogram sends him incognito to uncover what the boys are doing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ask a Foolish Question/ Misperceived Monotreme
programme.desc: When Candace discovers that Phineas and Ferb have invented a computer that can answer anything, she asks it how she can finally bust her brothers. Then, Perry misses his 100th battle against Doofenshmirtz to go to a charity pet wash with Candace.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Sal the Big Winner
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Snick Snack the Waddy Back
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Curse of the Ghost Tree
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: We Call It Maze/ Ladies and Gentlemen, Meet Max Modem!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create a life sized maze filled with fun obstacles. But things don't go as planned when the Little Sparks try out the maze. Lawrence asks the boys to help him turn into a pop star so he can perform with Linda at a Lindana concert.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Lost in Danville/ The Inator Method
programme.desc: Doof leads a Syd Field style seminar for inventors, Candace tries to bust the boys by multi-tasking and the boys create their own solar system.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Bully Code/ Finding Mary McGuffin
programme.desc: Dad accidentally sells Candace's favorite childhood doll, Mary McGuffin, to Dr. Doofenshmirtz. Baljeet asks for Phineas and Ferb's help when Buford starts to drive him nuts.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bully Bust/ Backyard Hodge Podge
programme.desc: Candace challenges Buford to keep the boys' invention from disappearing.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sidetracked
programme.desc: Agent P teams up with a former partner, a human agent named Lyla, to stop a runaway train running along the United States and Canadian border. Agent P and Lyla must complete the mission, defeat Doofenshmirtz and save the train's passengers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Lake Nose Monster
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb set out to rescue the mysterious Lake Nose monster from the effects of living in a zinc-less lake.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Excaliferb!
programme.desc: During medieval times, Phineas and Ferb set off on an epic quest to find the legendary sword, Excaliferb.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Wizard of Odd
programme.desc: While cleaning the house, the two brothers inadvertently send Candace away.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: My Fair Goalie
programme.desc: When Ferb's cousins visit from England and challenge him to a soccer match, he and Phineas warp the walls of physics and build a high tech 3D stadium. Candace enlists the help of Eliza to teach her the rules of etiquette.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
programme.desc: Marvel's Avengers and Spider-Man join Phineas, Ferb and the gang in order to fight evil.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out to Launch
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rocket ship to get a better look and their mom and dad's star.

programme.desc: Phineas, Ferb and the gang host a global concert – just as Doof's latest '-inator' invention moves Earth, putting summer in jeopardy.

programme.desc: Although their marriage has long ago lost its spark, Melinda has remained nothing but loyal to Robert, so when she discovers that she's been betrayed her feelings of rage become overwhelming, driving her to destroy his life and get her revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Tyler Perry's Temptation: Confessions of a Marriage Counselor
programme.desc: A married woman's life is changed forever when a handsome billionaire comes into her life and she gives into temptation.

programme.title: Movie: My Summer Prince
programme.desc: When a prince finds himself in some hot water for his partying ways, the royal family hires a PR consultant. But when she falls ill, her assistant steps in to take control of the campaign and possibly the prince's heart.

programme.title: Movie: My One and Only
programme.desc: Two contestants on the television show 'The One' find out if they're destined to be together, but then a handsome rancher acting as a guide swoops in.

programme.title: Movie: A Country Wedding
programme.desc: A country western star returns to his hometown to sell his childhood home. Upon his arrival, he meets the girl he proposed to when he was eight. Faced with old feelings, he will discover what really matters in life.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: 72 Hours
programme.desc: Rose discovers that she may be carrying the HIV virus after learning the blood they used in her gallbladder operation may have contained HIV antibodies.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Twice in a Lifetime
programme.desc: Rose briefly rekindles a romance she had with Buzz Mueller, but realizes she loves Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sisters and Other Strangers
programme.desc: Blanche is dumbfounded to discover that her sister, Charmaine, has written a novel.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Cheaters
programme.desc: Dorothy surprises herself and her housemates by having a relationship with a married man.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Mangiacavallo Curse Makes a Lousy Wedding Present
programme.desc: Sophia disrupts a wedding celebration by saying that she cursed the groom's grandfather.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All Bets Are Off
programme.desc: Dorothy risks everything when she lets her gambling problem get out of control.

programme.title: Frasier: The Maris Counselor
programme.desc: Niles and Maris' new marriage counsellor advises Niles to inject some spontaneity into their relationship. Niles attempts to surprise Maris in her bedroom, but isn't prepared for what he finds.

programme.title: Frasier: The Ski Lodge
programme.desc: Hormones start racing when Frasier, Niles, Martin and Daphne go on a holiday together.

programme.title: Frasier: Room Service
programme.desc: Lilith makes a surprise visit and is distraught that her husband has left her for another man. Frasier fears he is weak to Lilith's beauty and asks Niles to keep him way from her. The next morning, however, Niles and Lilith awaken in bed together.

programme.title: Frasier: Beware of Greeks
programme.desc: The Cranes are reunited with a branch of the family when a cousin is getting married. But first, Frasier must soothe old wounds with Martin's sister-in-law, which incurred after Frasier urged his cousin to study juggling instead of medicine.

programme.title: Frasier: The Perfect Guy
programme.desc: The radio station hires a new health expert, who seems perfect in every way. Frasier tries desperately to find Dr. Clint Webber's flaw, while Martin gets thrown out of the only store that carries Eddie's favourite dog food.

programme.title: Frasier: Bad Dog
programme.desc: Much to Frasier's chagrin, Bulldog becomes a hero during an attempted armed robbery.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Gotta Have It
programme.desc: Frasier has trouble accepting that his relationship is built on physical attraction.

programme.title: Frasier: First Date
programme.desc: Niles finally takes the initiative to ask Daphne out and Frasier gets hooked on a 'soap.'

programme.title: Reba: She's Leaving Home, Bye, Bye
programme.desc: Reba is at her wits end when Kyra decides to move in with her father and Barbara Jean.

programme.title: Reba: She's Leaving Home, Bye, Bye
programme.desc: Reba is at her wits end when Kyra decides to move in with her father and Barbara Jean.

programme.title: Reba: The Best and the Blondest
programme.desc: Cheyenne decides to pursue a career as a dentist to gain her father's approval.

programme.title: Reba: Spies Like Reba
programme.desc: Reba and Barbra Jean sneak a peak at Kyra's email and find out she is attending a party.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: An FBI agent investigates the girls' lives for a possible visit from President Bush. This leads the girls to reminisce about times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: When the FBI agent announces that George Bush will make a visit to their home, the girls continue to reminisce and Dorothy quickly readies a list of points she wants to make to the president.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche Delivers
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter wants to give birth in a birthing center while Blanche is preoccupied by the possibility of Rebecca delivering in a local hospital. Blanche doesn't want to be embarrassed by the fact that her daughter was artificially inseminated.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Once in St. Olaf
programme.desc: Rose makes a stunning discovery while admitting a patient at the hospital. Meanwhile, Sophia has to have surgery, but a mix-up occurs after the operation and Sophia becomes lost in the hospital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: If at Last You Do Succeed
programme.desc: Stan has finally hit it big with a new invention, but still Dorothy can't be happy for him. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche fight over some war bonds that, if cashed, could bankrupt St. Olaf.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Snap Out of It
programme.desc: Blanche is dreading her birthday and Dorothy helps Sophia with 'Meals on Wheels.'

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Autumn
programme.desc: A woman divides up her candy shop between her niece, and a maple farmer. Neither know her true intentions until they attend the Sweet Autumn Festival in town.

programme.title: Movie: Over the Moon in Love
programme.desc: With her match-making business on the verge of closing, Brooklyn finds herself in the unique position to be featured in a magazine. But first, she has to set up the writer with her childhood friend Devin.

programme.title: Movie: Love to the Rescue
programme.desc: An animator learns her daughter has found the love of her life, in a dog. She learns that she has some competition for this new pooch in the form of the PTA President at the school who has promised his son that they will adopt the same dog.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The antics of pre-pubescent school children Kyle, Cartman, Kenny and Stan, as they stumble through the deranged misadventures of their hometown, South Park.

programme.title: South Park: PC Principal Final Justice
programme.desc: Kyle has chosen a dangerous alliance over his friendship with Stan.

programme.title: South Park: Unfulfilled
programme.desc: South Park is chosen to be the home for Amazon's newest Fulfilment Centre.

programme.title: South Park: Bike Parade
programme.desc: The boys' chance of winning the Bike Parade is in jeopardy when Kenny quits.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go
programme.desc: Things go horribly wrong when Cartman plans to propel himself into the future. South Park Elementary School is facing strong opposition to the topic of evolution being taught to the fourth graders, especially from Mr. Garrison who must teach it.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII
programme.desc: After freezing himself in an attempt to make his three-week wait for a Nintendo Wii pass quickly, Cartman lands himself over 500 years in the future. Stuck in a tumultuous place with warring factions and angry sea otters, Cartman fights to return home.

programme.title: South Park: Freemium Isn't Free
programme.desc: Stan is addicted to the new Terrance and Phillip mobile game.

programme.title: South Park: Royal Pudding
programme.desc: The Prince of Canada is about to take a Princess and Ike is obsessed with the Royal Wedding.

programme.title: South Park: The New Terrance and Phillip Movie Trailer
programme.desc: All the kids in South Park are glued to the TV, wild with anticipation to see the first trailer for the latest Terrance and Phillip movie.

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip in 'Not Without My Anus'
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip must travel to Iran to save Terrance's little daughter, Sally. While they are gone Saddam Hussein takes over Canada, leaving Terrance and Phillip to save the entire country.

programme.title: South Park: Ike's Wee Wee
programme.desc: Mr. Mackey, the school counsellor, is fired and turns to drugs and alcohol. Meanwhile, when the boys find out what it means to be circumcised they try to save Ike from his Bris.

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip: Behind the Blow
programme.desc: When the boys discover Terrance and Philip have called it quits, they'll go to any lengths to reunite the duo and recruit them for South Park's Earth Day festivities.

programme.title: South Park: Canada on Strike
programme.desc: The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: South Park: Safe Space
programme.desc: Cartman is the latest victim of body shaming.

programme.title: South Park: Two Days Before the Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: After a global warming state of emergency is declared in South Park, the world's largest beaver dam breaks and floods the town of Beaverton. The people of South Park must figure out who they can blame before anyone can be saved in the adjacent town.

programme.title: South Park: Rainforest Shmainforest
programme.desc: The boys travel to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the 'Getting Gay with Kids' choir tour.

programme.title: South Park: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls
programme.desc: South Park's first film festival attracts crowds of pretentious, tofu-eating movie lovers to the quiet mountain town. The influx of raw vegetable waste taxes the sewage system putting Mr. Hankey's life in jeopardy.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Yesterday
programme.desc: Someone from Derek and Addison's past arrives in Seattle and shakes things up. Meanwhile, Burke learns about Christina's secret. After a visit with her mother, Meredith looks into more of her family's dirty little secrets.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: What Have I Done to Deserve This?
programme.desc: Meredith and George suddenly find themselves at odds at work. Bailey, although technically on maternity leave, finds herself treating Addison for an unusual feminine issue. Alex finds himself oddly jealous when Izzie pays more attention to Denny.

programme.title: The Closer: Serving the King
programme.desc: Resulting from the showdown in the murder room, Brenda finds herself taking some involuntary time off. When she is asked to help a friend solve a murder that is linked to a terrorist group, Brenda works to find the killer and still keep it under wraps.

programme.title: The Closer: Serving the King
programme.desc: Glad to be back with her team, Brenda focuses on finding a terrorist-linked suspect. Working with the CIA, she realizes that she was given false information and wonders if she's been set up.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Party Foul
programme.desc: It's all fun and games at a raucous teen party until two people are brutally attacked with a pair of scissors and the Major Crimes unit has their hands full picking the culprit out of the crowd. Provenza meets someone who will change his life.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Acting Out
programme.desc: A Hollywood comeback is interrupted when a former child star is found dead on skid row, leaving the director of the actor's current movie and his manager as prime suspects. Flynn's daughter comes to visit.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: There is a miscarriage of justice when a gang banger is acquitted of murder and released from custody. Sharon's ex-husband, Jack Raydor represents the suspect in a subsequent murder. Rusty takes a chance when the guy he has a crush on visits.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: When the Gun Goes Bang, Bang, Bang
programme.desc: After an undercover cop working a narcotics-smuggling sting is shot dead, the killers next turn their sites on Boston homicide headquarters, leaving Jane, Maura and Frankie Jr. trapped in a fight for survival.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: We've Got an Emergency Situation

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed and Airborne
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts track down private jets for repossession. Nick enlists his youngest son to gather photo intelligence, which prove crucial in an assignment riddled with unforeseen obstacles.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Spies in the Night

programme.title: Airplane Repo: South of the Border

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Saint Croix Swipe
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson try to repo two planes from a much-feared criminal. Meanwhile, Mike Kennedy's on a mission to repo a plane being stripped by a stolen-parts ring. And Kevin Lacey gets cozy with a debtor in order to swipe his classic jet.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: No Safe Harbor
programme.desc: Mike and his wife go undercover to repo a go-fast boat. Ken and Danny bring in some talented friends to pull off a rare simultaneous triple repo, and Kevin attempts to swipe a deadbeat flight school's entire fleet of Cessnas.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Hired Guns
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson repo a tour bus. Kevin Lacey faces armed guards on a nighttime repo, and Mike Kennedy is caught in a gun-smuggling operation.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Diving for Repos

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Guns, Girls and Gamblers

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo 911
programme.desc: Kevin poses as an interviewer to gain access to a Westwind jet, Ken and Danny valet a car to get the keys to a Cessna CJ3, and Mike repos an air ambulance, but not before he rescues their final lifesaving mission.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Leneatha's Story

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Carrie's Story

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Cindy's Story

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Wake-Up Call

programme.desc: The Bella family packs up and heads to Flagstaff for an eventful Bella babymoon. Brie and the rest of the family are alarmed to learn that Nicole and Artem still haven’t made decisions about their future regarding baby Matteo.

programme.title: Total Bellas: A Bella Babyshower
programme.desc: The Bella babymoon in Flagstaff comes to an end, and Brie and Nicole disagree with their mom on who should be invited to their baby shower. Nicole's sexual frustration causes her to act out in surprising ways, including pregnant skinny dipping.

programme.title: Total Bellas: Bye Bye Bella
programme.desc: Nicole and Artem attempt to change their birthing plan so they can have their baby in Phoenix, but that ends up complicating things for the entire Bella family. Brie worries about how she'll deal with a new baby once Bryan goes back on the road.

programme.title: Total Bellas: Family Ties
programme.desc: The Bella family is shocked to learn that Kathy must undergo a risky, emergency brain surgery. With their due dates fast approaching, Brie and Nicole announce some surprising plans for the future.

programme.title: Total Bellas: Bella Babies
programme.desc: The Bella family prepares to welcome its two newest members. While Nicole struggles through an intense labor, Brie holds out hope for a natural childbirth. Brie, Nicole, Bryan, and Artem share intimate and surprising moments from their childbirths.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Mountaintop Mystery
programme.desc: On Mt. Monadnock, a severed finger is found, sending a team and K-9 Wyatt to search for other possible body parts. A family of repeat offenders are found riding their ATVs without proper protective gear, and a man admits to an illegal bear kill.
