programme.title: Snapped: William Dennis
programme.desc: A horrific murder of a young mother on Halloween night sends California investigators on the hunt for a costumed killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Sahara Fakhir
programme.desc: When a beloved family man is found brutally murdered in his home, authorities must follow a trail of clues that exposes a strange and unlikely killer guided by gluttonous urges that led to murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Frances Truesdale
programme.desc: The 1988 roadside murder of a man in Virginia sends investigators down a path fraught with doubts and dead ends, until a long-buried secret is unearthed hundreds of miles away revealing decades old secrets.

programme.title: Snapped: Valerie Nessler
programme.desc: When a deadly rumor is stirred up among friends and acquaintances, it sets off an explosion of brutal violence so gruesome that not even a house fire can hide the truth.

programme.title: Snapped: Inside the Episode: Cindy McKay
programme.desc: Featuring details about investigations never before seen on 'Snapped.'

programme.title: Monster Preacher: Monster Preacher
programme.desc: In 1986, self-proclaimed pastor, Gary Heidnik, kidnapped, tortured and raped six women in Philadelphia, brutally murdering two. In this special, hear from two of the victims themselves as they recount the horrors of surviving the monster preacher.

programme.title: Exhumed: Killer Obsession
programme.desc: Murder cases in which unearthing a victim's body is the key to solving the twisted crimes.

programme.title: Exhumed: Cold Case, Unearthed
programme.desc: Marilyn McIntyre's gruesome murder goes unsolved for decades, until a phone call resurrects the investigation. Is it possible evidence is buried with the victim? After thirty years underground, does it still exist?

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Twisted Betrayal
programme.desc: When a devoted mother with a bright future in show business is ruthlessly gunned down, a number of suspects emerge, but just as detectives think they have the killer in their sights, the investigation takes a jaw dropping turn.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Modern Family Murder
programme.desc: Police investigating the murder of a devoutly religious couple uncover dark family secrets, leading them to a suspect that shocks everyone.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Dying to See You
programme.desc: When a popular college student is found slain in the middle of campus, police suspect his friends and lovers might be involved.

programme.title: Snapped: Hazelynn Stomps
programme.desc: After a woman reports that she and her husband were attacked by a pair of assailants, authorities in Oregon launch an investigation into the crime and unravel a complex scheme.

programme.title: Snapped: Hope Schreiner
programme.desc: To solve the sudden and violent murder of a retired landscape architect, investigators weed through information about a disgruntled neighbor and an illicit affair only to find that seeds of resentment are often planted close to home.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Who Killed the Radio Star
programme.desc: Steven B. Williams was a DJ with a golden voice. Then he vanished. It was a mystery that stretched from California to Montana. The clue to it all was wrapped in napkin tucked in a cabinet hidden in a library.

programme.title: American Greed: Scams, Scoundrels and Scandals: Fake Heiress Cons High Society
programme.desc: An artsy German heiress Anna Delvey makes a splash in downtown New York's social scene, but she's really a Russian-born con artist who's trying to swindle $23 million from banks while dodging unpaid bills.

programme.title: American Greed: Scams, Scoundrels and Scandals: The Fake Housewife of Orange County
programme.desc: In sunny Laguna Beach social climber Elizabeth Mulder finances her plastic surgery, Arabian horses, and ocean view real estate worth millions by swindling her best friends.

programme.title: American Greed: Scams, Scoundrels and Scandals: The Trials of Michael Avenatti
programme.desc: Michael Avenatti, the flashy litigator that represented porn star Stormy Daniels in her dispute with President Donald Trump, faces his own legal troubles. His alleged crimes range from theft to tax evasion.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: In the Middle of the Night
programme.desc: After college student Angie Samota was stabbed to death, police had no shortage of suspects. A crucial clue narrowed their list to one name, but it would be years before technology and a tenacious friend came together to help unravel this mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Missing Marie
programme.desc: Marie Singleton was a single mom who fell hard for Andre Jackson, a single dad raising his two kids. The couple married and seemed happy. Then Marie vanished and investigators discovered secrets. Was her disappearance related to her undercover job?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Intent
programme.desc: Connie and Larry Hoagland built a life centered on faith and family. Then, a vicious attack threatened it all. Someone wanted Connie dead. But who? After a bomb exploded underneath her car, secrets started to emerge.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: Eric Glisson was convicted of a murder he swore he didn't commit. To prove his innocence, he had to find the real killers, unearthing their long-held secrets. It would take years for the truth to be revealed, but could it set him free?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Denial
programme.desc: Raven Abaroa swooped into Vanessa Pond's life and stole her heart. Then Vanessa discovered her dream man had a tragic past. His first wife had been killed. Was he a grieving widower or somehow involved? Dark secrets were about to be spilled.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unspeakable
programme.desc: Sandra and Jamie Melgar were high school sweethearts who were celebrating their 32nd anniversary. Then, the intimate evening turned deadly. To crack the case, investigators had to uncover the secrets of an illusion worthy of the great Houdini.

programme.title: Movie: Mike and Dave Need Wedding Dates
programme.desc: Two brothers place an ad seeking dates to their sister's wedding. They find two girls, who secretly just want a free trip. The girls pretend to be respectable, but once they get to Hawaii, the brothers realize they are extremely wild and unhinged.

programme.title: Movie: Blockers
programme.desc: Three parents try to stop their daughters from losing their virginity on prom night.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Moms
programme.desc: Amy Mitchell seemingly has a perfect life with a career and children, however, she is dangerously over-worked. She finally snaps at a PTA meeting and joins forces with two other moms. Together, they go on a wild binge of freedom and indulgence.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Flat-Top O' the Morning to Ya
programme.desc: Bob and the kids help a down-on-his-luck restaurant owner, while Linda and Teddy get carried away with St. Patrick's Day festivities.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Yurty Rotten Scoundrels
programme.desc: When Gayle decides to host an artists' workshop in a yurt with only one attendee, Linda feels compelled to go to support her sister. Meanwhile, Louise and Gene lead a covert operation to find a lost cat for a cash reward.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Just the Trip
programme.desc: The family takes an unexpected road trip with Nat the limo driver.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Tappy Tappy Tappy Tap Tap Tap

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Handyman Can

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Poops!... I Didn't Do It Again

programme.title: Life: Challenges of Life
programme.desc: Journey through Earth to discover the extraordinary diversity of animals and plants that exists today and the most extreme stories of survival nature has to offer.

programme.title: Life: Reptiles and Amphibians
programme.desc: Reptiles and amphibians live on every continent except Antarctica. From icy wastelands to arid deserts, they outnumber mammals and birds, and their extraordinary forms and bizarre behaviour are constantly surprising.

programme.title: Life: Mammals

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Why Dogs Fight
programme.desc: Cesar reveals how dogs communicate through their energy and body language, to help resolve a potentially disastrous situation.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hounded by Fear
programme.desc: Cesar helps dog-fearing humans overcome their phobias and overcome their anxiety when they're around dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Homeboys and Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar takes on the challenge of two former gang members and their problem mutts.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Mascot Mayhem
programme.desc: A hyper dog is made into an exemplary mascot with Cesar's help.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Pack Leaders in Training
programme.desc: Cesar has always believed that kids are more receptive to his training methods and often succeed in getting a dog to behave faster than most adults can.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: North Carolina: Chimp Off the Old Block
programme.desc: Zoo keepers prepare for a chimp birth, while vets investigate a bear's mystery illness.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: North Carolina: Dr. Zoo-Little
programme.desc: A gorilla has emergency surgery, while zoo keepers try to take blood from a lion's tail.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: North Carolina: Polar Bear Opposites
programme.desc: As mating season approaches, the zoo hopes for a polar-bear pregnancy.

programme.title: How Dogs Got Their Shapes
programme.desc: Dogs are the most diverse mammal on land and there’s a story behind each dog shape.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gateway to Eden
programme.desc: A buried monument offers new evidence about one of the Bible's greatest mysteries. A giant ominous shadow engulfs the Pacific Ocean. Scientists have trouble explaining a strange lake that's shaped like a perfect circle, and is home to otherworldly life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Stonehenge
programme.desc: A mysterious Stonehenge-like structure in Russia might have links to the Nazis. Experts uncover clues to a mega-tsunami with the power to devastate the United States. A huge lake appears in the Sahara overnight, and its explanation could be mythical.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: BattleBots: Sin City Slasher
programme.desc: Giant Nut runner-up Witch Doctor faces Kraken: both are winless and desperate for victory. Vegas newcomer Jackpot rolls the dice against veteran Ghost Raptor and flipper Hydra has an enormous surprise in store for HUGE.

programme.title: BattleBots: Mega Fights: Savage Spinners
programme.desc: A deadly battle of horizontal spinners ensues as Valkyrie and Rotator square off in the BattleBox. With both bots undefeated, Malice and MadCatter engage in all-out warfare, while Uppercut takes on SawBlaze in an explosive main event.

programme.title: White Rabbit Project: May G-Force Be with You
programme.desc: Bobsledders, race car drivers and roller coaster riders battle gravity head-on. The team learns which adrenaline junkies get the biggest G-force rush.

programme.title: BattleBots: Mega Fights: Savage Spinners
programme.desc: A deadly battle of horizontal spinners ensues as Valkyrie and Rotator square off in the BattleBox. With both bots undefeated, Malice and MadCatter engage in all-out warfare, while Uppercut takes on SawBlaze in an explosive main event.

programme.title: White Rabbit Project: May G-Force Be with You
programme.desc: Bobsledders, race car drivers and roller coaster riders battle gravity head-on. The team learns which adrenaline junkies get the biggest G-force rush.

programme.title: BattleBots: Sin City Slasher
programme.desc: Giant Nut runner-up Witch Doctor faces Kraken: both are winless and desperate for victory. Vegas newcomer Jackpot rolls the dice against veteran Ghost Raptor and flipper Hydra has an enormous surprise in store for HUGE.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Confessions of the Exorcist
programme.desc: For the first time, a participant in the real exorcism that inspires the movie 'The Exorcist' reveals his experience.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: America's Haunted Highway
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Blood Rain, Carolina Beach Boom and Voynich Manuscript
programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Yeti: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New investigation of declassified Soviet files reveals evidence of an explanation for the grisly deaths of nine students who went missing in Siberia. Scientists examine clues that may prove the existence of a yeti.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Forbidden Land of the Giants
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Omen of the Pharaoh's Wail
programme.desc: At the tomb of one 3,000-year-old Egyptian pharaoh, experts report that the massive statues that guard the site can sing; using cutting-edge technology, investigators hunt for an explanation for this mysterious phenomenon.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Special sneak peek of the new season of Mysteries of the Abandoned.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: The Ghost on the Radio
programme.desc: When someone picks up a radio distress call from a seven-year-old boy lost alone in the desert, authorities embark on a search-and-rescue mission to find him; as the hunt continues, the case becomes more and more mysterious.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Curse of the Lost Cosmonaut
programme.desc: When two experts build their own radio-listening station to intercept the secret communications of American and Soviet astronauts, they capture traces of a haunting voice that may be a lost Russian cosmonaut. New, declassified evidence reveals the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: To Catch a UFO
programme.desc: An intercept pilot chases a UFO only to vanish forever, then, a mysterious hum plagues 2% of the planet.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: A young mother is strangled to death in her bedroom while her young son sleeps. As Detective Fil Waters digs into the mystery, he soon learns the victim's own mother was murdered twenty-five years earlier.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Project Hitchhiker
programme.desc: When a young woman in Pickering, Ontario vanishes, evidence points to one man and a string of serial killings. But when red tape threatens to get in the way, Detective Herb Curwain is willing to do whatever it takes.

programme.title: Homicide City: Society Hill Slaying
programme.desc: When Philadelphia jewelers Patty and Richard Zimmerman are found executed in their Society Hill townhome, police suspect a robbery gone wrong. But, when they discover nothing has been taken, they realize the motive may be far more sinister.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Last Call
programme.desc: A traumatized man calls 911 after seeing his friend shot and killed right before his eyes. With a surprisingly long list of suspects, investigators must sort through layers of lies, jealousy, and mistrust, until they finally uncover the shooter.

programme.title: See No Evil: I'd Kill to Be You
programme.desc: On November 12, 2012, Atlanta entrepreneur Terry Porter is found shot dead, execution style in the front yard of his home. There is no forensic evidence and no witnesses to the murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Cage
programme.desc: Kenda finds the bullet-ridden bodies of a middle-aged couple in a musty suburban house alongside the corpses of their two beloved pets. But the case is stuck in neutral until detectives discover an essential clue hidden behind an old wire birdcage.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda: discovery+ 1st Look: Murder, Murder, Murder
programme.desc: A Seattle woman is slain steps from an infamous homeless encampment known as 'The Jungle.' After navigating a set of false leads, Det. Cloyd Steiger connects her case to a pair of unsolved homicides, triggering a city-wide hunt for a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Jeckyll and Hyde
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda looks for answers in the death of Calvin Blair, a young man stabbed and left for dead on the roadside; when Alexandra Drake is shot in the face, she manages to tell police it was accidental but Kenda isn't so sure he believes her.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Cage
programme.desc: Kenda finds the bullet-ridden bodies of a middle-aged couple in a musty suburban house alongside the corpses of their two beloved pets. But the case is stuck in neutral until detectives discover an essential clue hidden behind an old wire birdcage.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda: discovery+ 1st Look: Murder, Murder, Murder
programme.desc: A Seattle woman is slain steps from an infamous homeless encampment known as 'The Jungle.' After navigating a set of false leads, Det. Cloyd Steiger connects her case to a pair of unsolved homicides, triggering a city-wide hunt for a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Jeckyll and Hyde
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda looks for answers in the death of Calvin Blair, a young man stabbed and left for dead on the roadside; when Alexandra Drake is shot in the face, she manages to tell police it was accidental but Kenda isn't so sure he believes her.

programme.title: See No Evil: I'd Kill to Be You
programme.desc: On November 12, 2012, Atlanta entrepreneur Terry Porter is found shot dead, execution style in the front yard of his home. There is no forensic evidence and no witnesses to the murder.

programme.title: Twisted: Twisted Tourniquet
programme.desc: Women in Virginia were told to nail their windows shut in order to protect themselves from the 'Southside strangler' Timothy Spencer who climbed in through windows to kill his victims in their homes.

programme.title: Twisted: Killer Cousins
programme.desc: Cousins Waterfield and Gore hunted women in Vero Beach, Florida. Their perverse and violent acts resulted in the sexual abuse and murder of 6 young women before Gore was caught.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: The Shadow of the Steeple
programme.desc: In 2001, parishioners arrive at church, unaware that they are passing a grisly crime scene in their own parking lot. Someone has stabbed Tracey Bagwell in her car 30 times. Police soon discover that Tracey knew a secret... one worth killing for.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Blood Red Reunion
programme.desc: After a long-lost daughter reunites with her family, their peaceful Florida neighborhood is devastated by scandal, betrayal, and a double-murder.

programme.title: Disappeared: No Stone Unturned
programme.desc: 60-year old stonemason David Riemens, needs has one final meeting before driving to visit family. But he never returns home, and his truck is found abandoned. Desperate to find him, investigators look for clues, but David has vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Disappeared: Love Triangle
programme.desc: Waitress Brandy Hanna leaves work Friday afternoon for a weekend off. But Monday morning, when she doesn't show up for work, her mother is convinced Brandy is in trouble.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Taken in Tennessee
programme.desc: In 2011, 20-year-old Holly Bobo was abducted from her home in rural Tennessee. A search turned up some of her personal items, including her cell phone. But Holly was gone. The trail went cold for two years until a hunter made a gruesome find.

programme.title: Killer Unknown: Chasing Truth
programme.desc: On the Dean case, phones are confiscated with a new plan to comb through communications between persons of interest. Will the data reveal incriminating information? On the Woodson case, Huff thinks a suspect's family may be hiding something.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Murder in the Chat Room
programme.desc: In the wake of a broken marriage, 28-year old Samantha Lezark's struggle to find love again has a fatal ending. Now, investigators must follow her digital trail through different chat rooms to uncover her killer.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Sensing Secrets
programme.desc: Young mother of three Christine Sheddy is trying to put her life back on track after tragedy and heartbreak. But just when she's on the verge of a fresh start, she disappears without a trace and every person in her life becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Home Alone: Bullets in the Basement
programme.desc: Single mom Erin installs a security system when she realizes that someone's been inside her home. But that doesn't stop the intruder from breaking in, determined to end her life as well as his own.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Texas Terror
programme.desc: When thirteen-year-old Texas City girl Krystal Baker is found dead off the banks of the Galveston Bay, investigators round up a herd of suspects. But with little physical evidence on the scene, it takes a dedicated detective to solve this case.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: No Liars Allowed
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we'll reveal the true stories behind America's most infamous bad guys, and uncover the truths behind America's notorious secret societies.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Deacon Jim Miller: The Pious Assassin
programme.desc: His neighbours saw a devout family man. The last thing his victims saw was a shotgun aimed at their heads. If there's an outlaw who was born to kill it's Deacon Jim Miller, the Bible-thumping psycho-killer.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Joseph Stalin
programme.desc: It's clear Nazi Germany lost the war, but the real winner remains uncertain. At the Yalta Conference, the United States, Britain and the Soviet Union compete for domination of Europe.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: The Heroes Who Fought Back
programme.desc: A look at the brave men and women who fought back and showed courage in the face of danger in the attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Cottage
programme.desc: The guys turn a brand new storage shed into an 1800s log cabin, then drive it to Round Top, Texas. Mark gets a lesson from a local silversmith, and the team visits historic structures built around the state by 19th-century pioneers.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Wedding Chapel
programme.desc: A couple enlists the crew to build a log chapel which will be used as a venue for weddings in Waynesboro, Virginia. Later, Mark tours an old Texas church and visits a 1795 log-built bed and breakfast.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Scandinavian Modern?
programme.desc: The crew turn a dark, divided 1887 two-family into an open, Scandinavian-style one-family home in Cambridge, Massachusetts. Kevin tours the house and Richard does an eye-opening energy audit. Architect Marcus Gleysteen shares his Scandinavian-style home.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Deconstruction and Design
programme.desc: Deconstruction continues on the 1887 two-family home. Arborist Jack Kelly removes the sick Norway maple that, left untouched, would come down on its own one day soon.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Modernizing a Balloon Frame
programme.desc: With the interior opened up, master carpenter Norm Abram shows the bones of the building and the unique features of a balloon framed house. Kevin and the homeowner learn about appropriate colours for the outside of her Victorian-era house.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Swedish Style
programme.desc: The general contractor works on the architect's plans to vary ceiling height on the first floor for dramatic effect. Two-by-fours and strapping drop the ceiling by eight inches in two places. Designers share the evolution of Scandinavian modern style.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Cold Front
programme.desc: Mike Holmes inspects a large detached home that Kim and Stuart are apparently sharing with the squirrels.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Rail Against the Deck
programme.desc: Homeowners find their deck crumbling in their hands.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Mike helps families who have suffered through faulty home inspections repair damage. Each week, he examines the problem situation, determines what went wrong, then he and crew get busy fixing the issue.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Something Stinks
programme.desc: Something smells rotten in a next-to-new townhouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Meek Farmhouse
programme.desc: Mike and Robert remove a two-piece staircase from a farmhouse in Marion, VA. The guys also pick through a train yard. Back at the shop, Mike builds a bar from panel doors as a surprise for a customer's husband.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restored: 1915 Arts And Crafts
programme.desc: Brett Waterman gets the chance to restore an enormous Arts and Crafts home with six bedrooms for a family that grew from four children to eight children in just two years.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1913 craftsman bungalow for a young couple with a baby on the way. He's challenged with finding a way to bring back the natural wood in the house while still making it bright and welcoming.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Mission Revival Mansion
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a mother and her grown-up children restore their majestic 1913 Mission Revival mansion. He's elated when he realizes he can restore the original linoleum in the kitchen, but the homeowners may not open to the idea.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Restored: 1926 French Normandy Cottage
programme.desc: A cottage build in 1926 was a severely neglected rental for 30 years. Brett deals with a leaky roof, rotten windows, missing floorboards and damaged walls.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Lawn and Order
programme.desc: Dan and Sarah envied their neighbour's deck, and after receiving a too good to be true quote, hired the same person for the job. But the project was much bigger than anticipated and vastly underquoted. Mike arrives just in time to avoid catastrophe.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: To Mike, From Aggie
programme.desc: A nurse who works countless hours at a brain injury center is too busy supporting her family to fix the many problems in her new house. Her mother-in-law Aggie is so desperate to help she delivers a letter straight to Mike's mailbox.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Flood Suckers
programme.desc: After a historic downpour in the City of Toronto, Gina’s basement floods with water from the city’s sewage system. Mike does double-duty as he tries to save this family’s home as well as the memories stored in an old workshop in the basement.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: A Case of Shingles
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his team get on top of a bad roof that has plagued a family for 40 years. The damage Mike uncovers proves they have been coping with leaks for nearly half a century.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Whole Hog
programme.desc: Michael Symon smokes a whole hog for a juicy pulled pork sandwich in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Mountains Of Meat
programme.desc: Michael Symon meets a chef bringing the Indian street food flavors of his childhood to Asheville, N.C., with his own take on a sloppy joe that he calls a Sloppy Jai, with lamb hash and 30 Indian spices.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smokehouse Reinventions
programme.desc: In Islip, N.Y., Michael Symon digs into a decadent, 17-layer smokehouse reinvention of lasagna with pork, brisket, bacon and mac and cheese. Then in Buffalo, a brewpub serves up the city's most famous export, buffalo chicken.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fight Club Sandwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe meets his match with some knock-out fruity feasts at the Florida Strawberry Festival in Plant City. He starts the day with the strawberry French toast burger and slurps the way better strawberry shake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Dog Time Machine
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a trip to the Coastal Carolina Fair near Charleston, S.C., where he samples a local legend, Jack's Cosmic Dog. Trolling the fairgrounds, Noah catches the catfish sundae and takes a bite of fall flavors with the pumpkin cheesecake pop.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ham-let
programme.desc: Noah heads to San Diego and hams it up at the Balboa Park December Nights festival. The day starts off right with a breakfast Belgian waffle called the "Ham I Am."

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A-Frying in Winter
programme.desc: Noah Cappe chills out with some cool Twin City treats at the Saint Paul Winter Carnival. Despite sub-zero temperatures, he gets into the spirit with local specialties like the Nordic Waffle Pizza and the super-indulgent Biergarten Cupcake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Citizen Candy Cane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Greater Baton Rouge State Fair for a helping of Cajun treats, like the Cajun Boudin Taco and Pecan Pie Pop. Then he's off to bask in the lights -- and eats -- of the Aurora Winter Festival in Toronto, Canada.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pub Grub
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes on a pub crawl to find 15 of the best dishes to go with any drink. Chicken wings, nachos, sliders, apps and mains, they're all here. Chefs share insider tips and tricks for making the very best, tastiest bar fare.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Food With a View
programme.desc: We travel to places that combine majestic views with savory foods. From the Gulf Coast of Florida to the awe-inspiring beauty of the Teton Mountain range, get ready for a visual feast.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Titanic Treats

programme.title: Martin: I Saw Gina Kissing Santa Claus

programme.title: Martin: Break Up (Part Two)

programme.title: Martin: Break Up (Part Three)

programme.desc: Uncle Phil's fraternity brother offers Will an internship at his company.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Cold Feet, Hot Body
programme.desc: Will wrestles with temptation when an attractive new student tries to lure him from Lisa.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Love in an Elevator
programme.desc: While stuck in an elevator, Carlton and Jazz argue over who will be Will's best man.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Wedding Show (Psyche)

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Burnin' Down the House
programme.desc: Will accidentally sets fire to the kitchen just before Phil's boss comes to dinner.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Get a Job

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Stress Related

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Bourgie Sings the Blues
programme.desc: Carlton loses a job, which could keep him from attending his favourite Ivy League school.

programme.title: Movie: He's Just Not That Into You

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: Paris, Wine and Romance
programme.desc: A winery owner travels to Paris for a major wine competition. She hopes her latest vintage will bring her numerous awards and accolades so she can make her father proud. While at the competition, she meets a man and starts a Parisian romance.

programme.title: Movie: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: A woman burned by a boyfriend on New Year’s escapes on a ski getaway and is snowed in with a handsome entrepreneur.

programme.title: Movie: SnowComing

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: An FBI agent investigates the girls' lives for a possible visit from President Bush. This leads the girls to reminisce about times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: When the FBI agent announces that George Bush will make a visit to their home, the girls continue to reminisce and Dorothy quickly readies a list of points she wants to make to the president.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche Delivers
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter wants to give birth in a birthing center while Blanche is preoccupied by the possibility of Rebecca delivering in a local hospital. Blanche doesn't want to be embarrassed by the fact that her daughter was artificially inseminated.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Once in St. Olaf
programme.desc: Rose makes a stunning discovery while admitting a patient at the hospital. Meanwhile, Sophia has to have surgery, but a mix-up occurs after the operation and Sophia becomes lost in the hospital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: If at Last You Do Succeed
programme.desc: Stan has finally hit it big with a new invention, but still Dorothy can't be happy for him. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche fight over some war bonds that, if cashed, could bankrupt St. Olaf.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Snap Out of It
programme.desc: Blanche is dreading her birthday and Dorothy helps Sophia with 'Meals on Wheels.'

programme.title: Frasier: Roz and the Schnoz

programme.title: Frasier: The Life of the Party

programme.title: Frasier: Party, Party
programme.desc: Frasier makes an effort to spend time with a charming woman whom he recently met.

programme.title: Frasier: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: When Frasier stands up for himself, his new station manager has a surprising reaction.

programme.title: Frasier: Good Grief
programme.desc: In between job hunting, Frasier keeps busy by hosting a picnic for other unemployed staff.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier's Curse
programme.desc: Frasier is wary of attending his high school reunion after a disastrous job interview.

programme.title: Frasier: Dial 'M' for Martin
programme.desc: When an unemployed Frasier begins spending too much time at home, Martin wants to move.

programme.title: Frasier: Hot Ticket
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles struggle to secure tickets to the theatrical event of the season.

programme.title: Reba: Calling the Pot Brock
programme.desc: Hoping to dissuade Kyra from trying marijuana, Barbra Jean has a conversation about drugs.

programme.title: Reba: Encounters
programme.desc: Reba persuades Kyra to join her in a communication workshop to help their relationship.

programme.title: Reba: The Ghost and Mrs. Hart
programme.desc: Reba tries to convince Barbara Jean that her house is haunted by the previous owner.

programme.title: Reba: The Cat's Meow
programme.desc: Kyra and Barbara Jean find a stray cat and hide it in the attic so Brock won't find out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Wham, Bam, Thank You, Mammy

programme.desc: Dorothy resists pressure to pass a failing student-athlete and Rose accuses her dentist.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Zborn Again

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mrs. George Devereaux
programme.desc: Blanche has a dream in which she is visited by her deceased husband, George Devereaux.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun..Before They Die
programme.desc: Blanche tries to help Sophia seduce her date; Rose's relationship with Miles is affected.

programme.title: Movie: Falling for Vermont
programme.desc: When a best-selling author decides to escape the media, her plan goes awry when she's caught in a thunderstorm and crashes her car. She wakes up with no memory of who she is.

programme.title: Movie: Love Under the Olive Tree

programme.desc: When Andy's sales are at his lowest ever, he gets desperate to hold a small business seminar.

programme.title: The Office: The Search

programme.title: The Office: PDA
programme.desc: It is Valentine's Day and Michael and Holly's public displays of affection make everyone uncomfortable. The aftermath of a bottomless champagne lunch causes complications for Jim and Pam.

programme.title: The Office: Threat Level Midnight
programme.desc: Michael is finally ready to present his long-awaited action movie 'Threat Level Midnight,' to his co-workers and his love interest.

programme.title: The Office: Todd Packer
programme.desc: Todd Packer is ready to stop being a travelling salesman and takes a desk job in the office. Andy fights Pam for a new computer after his keeps freezing.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Living Proof
programme.desc: Jane and Maura's relaxing day at an outdoor spa is anything but when they discover the murder of a pregnant woman serving as a surrogate mother. Soon the hunt is on the find the baby's biological parents.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sailor Man
programme.desc: Shortly after sailors invade the streets of Boston for Fleet Week a young girl is found dead. Frost's father, a Navy Admiral, comes to town, causing tension with his son. Maura goes on a date with Angela's mechanic.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Brown Eyed Girl
programme.desc: When the daughter of a police officer is kidnapped, Jane and the team race to find her, fearing the abduction is connected to another case where a young girl turned up dead only hours earlier.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Don't Hate the Player
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate after the coach of the Boston Pilgrims baseball team is found dead in the locker room. The death comes as a star player and the team owners battle for control of the team.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Rebel Without a Pause
programme.desc: A Revolutionary War re-enactment becomes the scene of a real killing when a soldier turns up dead. Maura's extensive knowledge of American history becomes important as she and Jane try to solve the case.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bloodlines
programme.desc: Jane and the team investigate what appears to be a modern-day witch hunt in Salem. Meanwhile, Frankie's old girlfriend returns to town with a surprise and Jane has no problem speaking her mind about the problem.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: My Own Worst Enemy
programme.desc: Jane and Maura delve into a family's background when a man is killed in what appears to be a mugging gone wrong. Meanwhile, a romantic and mysterious figure from Maura's past shows up, causing a rift when Jane suspects Maura is hiding something.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Operation Career
programme.desc: We're exploring leading companies who are changing the careers and lives of military veterans across the country.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Band-Aid Covers the Bullet Hole
programme.desc: While Derek and Addison attempt to come to terms with their relationship, Cristina's day takes a turn for the worse when Bailey instructs her to take care of her baby. Meanwhile, Denny continues to be an obstacle in Alex's attempt to get closer to Izzie.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Superstition
programme.desc: When a series of deaths occur at Seattle Grace, Izzie becomes very nervous about Denny's surgery. Meanwhile, Derek and Addison discuss making a more permanent living arrangement, and Richard treats a very special old friend.

programme.title: The Closer: Home Wrecker
programme.desc: Budget cuts force Brenda to either give one of her team members to the counterterrorism unit or make Provenza retire early. The team investigates the murder of a family whose surviving son is the main suspect.

programme.title: The Closer: Grave Doubts
programme.desc: The body of a long-missing, young gang member is found.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Santa finds himself on the naughty list after robbing a bank, but a Santa flash mob complicates his apprehension and the Major Crimes unit scrambles to figure out how things went so wrong. Sharon's kids come to town for the holidays.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: Tensions are high when Flynn has to talk down a man precariously holding on to the ledge of a bridge, only to find out that the jumper is a sex offender with a dead body in his car. Old wounds are opened as Rusty prepares an impact statement.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: Sanchez is put under the microscope when his mother's caregiver is found murdered. Rusty is forced to take on Jack when he shows up at Sharon's condo acting recklessly.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Gone Daddy Gone
programme.desc: When a young, female dockworker is found dead, the team discovers that the dock has mob connections that may lead to Maura's biological father. Meanwhile, Jane tries to evade sensitivity training and Maura starts spending time with Jane's brother.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Burning Betrayal
programme.desc: When Mary Ann Langley finds her husband James nearly burned to death in their home, investigators must race to determine if it was an accident or assault before they lose him.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: Sandee Rozzo is preparing to face her attacker at court when she’s gunned down in her garage. The culprit seems obvious, but as detectives dig deeper, they learn nothing about this case is cut and dry.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Lethal Lover
programme.desc: When police respond to a harrowing 9-1-1 call from a man pleading for his life, they are led on the trail of a revenge plot more disturbing than the young victim’s worst nightmare.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Trust Fund Terror
programme.desc: The brutal slaying of a Fresno family leaves one heir to the family fortune and investigators searching for answers.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Wealthy Widow
programme.desc: A widow's tears after her husband's roadside murder on the Ohio Turnpike help investigators uncover secret drug addictions and illicit affairs.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: BattleBots: Battle of the Undefeated
programme.desc: Sparks are flying at the midpoint of the season as Valkyrie and Rotator square off in a battle of hard-hitting horizontal spinners. Undefeated bots Malice and MadCatter duke it out and Uppercut takes on bad-bot Sawblaze in an explosive main event.

programme.title: BattleBots: Battle of the Undefeated
programme.desc: Hard-hitting horizontal spinners collide as Valkyrie and Rotator square off. Undefeated bots Malice and MadCatter do battle, then Uppercut challenges Sawblaze in the main event.

programme.title: BattleBots: Turning Up the Heat
programme.desc: Slick-driving Whiplash looks to get its championship aspirations back on track against Gruff's menacing flamethrowers. Underdog Rusty tries attempts to upset veteran Beta, and Hypershock locks horns with Mammoth in a gear-grinding showdown.

programme.title: BattleBots: You Mess With the Bull, You Get the Drum

programme.title: River Of No Return: Hard As Rocks
programme.desc: With dangerous rocks exposed by low water, Buck must hit high speeds to keep his jetboat out of harm's way. Landing solo on a narrow airstrip tests Katie as a pilot. Aubrey plays matchmaker between her reluctant mare and a stud donkey.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Guts No Glory
programme.desc: Todd, Jack and their crew of unemployed mining greenhorns leave their homes in Oregon with hopes of striking gold and saving their families in southeast Alaska.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold, Guns, and Bears
programme.desc: The greenhorn miners are at risk when a mechanical accident threatens to close mining season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Running Dirt
programme.desc: The crew races to set up the mining plant and start running dirt. When the families arrive from Oregon and question the lack of gold and the men's only mechanic becomes dangerously ill, the tension builds so high Dorsey and Todd come to blows.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Ultimate Price
programme.desc: The team attempts to finally run potential pay dirt through the wash plant, but a visit from the Department of Fish and Game reveals a violation, jeopardizing their vital water supply to the mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Pain Barrier
programme.desc: The miners continue to run dirt but an equipment malfunction brings the operation to a halt. James Harness collapses and Jimmy Dorsey drives a wedge between himself and the crew when he takes on an extra job to earn cash.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold Fever
programme.desc: After 80 days, the miners are behind schedule and out of money. They need to find $10,000 worth of gold within two days or the families will be sent home. Meanwhile, after Dorsey struggles with the wave table, tensions flare and fists fly.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Going for Broke
programme.desc: With winter weather closing in, a gold recovery expert comes to help the rookies. Todd discovers a major design flaw in the equipment and is forced to make huge modifications.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bad Blood
programme.desc: The crew remains in deep financial hole. Veteran miner "Dakota" Fred thinks he can turn things around and he cranks up production faster than ever before. But when things start falling apart, tensions mount and Harness can't keep his frustration in.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bedrock or Bust
programme.desc: Desperate to get to bedrock and large quantities of gold, Todd and Jack throw caution to the wind and dig deeper than ever before. With the brutal Alaskan winter threatening, they battle floods, cave-ins and equipment breakdowns.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Never Say Die
programme.desc: With the arctic winter looming, the crew races against the clock. Rain and thawing snow flood the mine and Jack puts his life on the line as the glory hole caves in around the massive 100,000 pound excavator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: So many shoppers in the candy aisle during 'Star Struck'. The celeb that was on set while the guys filmed 'Brain Games'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.desc: Kevin Hart and Jimmy Kimmel train with the Harlem Globetrotters to learn the art of basketball tricks.

programme.desc: Kevin Hart orders various fitness equipment from As Seen On TV and invites Bill Hader to try out the equipment.

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face: Sweatsuit Charades and Donuts Holes

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face: Balloon Twerks and Googly Eyes
programme.desc: Kevin Hart, his wife, and celebrity guests take part in a games night.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Superchef, Supermodel
programme.desc: Superchef Anne Burrell teams up with supermodel Gigi Hadid to give Bobby a real taste of the spotlight. They're hoping international chefs Melissa Araujo and Max Robbins can blind Bobby with their brilliance and cat walk out a win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Beauty And The Beast
programme.desc: The arena gets a facelift when New York City's small but mighty chef Deb Caplan takes on Beantown's Nicholas Lisotto.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Aged to Perfection
programme.desc: Michael Strahan and Michael Symon have handpicked two chefs hoping to score a touchdown on Bobby Flay's home turf! New York chef Anastacia Song and Southern sweetie Joey Ward are prepared to bring their best game and score the win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Too Biggs To Fail
programme.desc: Katie Lee and Jason Biggs put one in Bobby Flay's loss column. Their fingers are crossed that either Colombian restaurateur Sam Gorenstein or Mexican chef David Vargas can bring the heat necessary.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Double Trouble
programme.desc: It's up to the dynamic duo of Daphne Oz and Damaris Phillips to decide who has the skill to paint Bobby Flay out of the picture as chef and artist Enrique Limardo goes up against Southwestern chef Jeff Smedstad in an all-out culinary battle.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: No Formalities
programme.desc: Tre Wilcox brings his high energy against Chef Sarah Acconcia in this battle for bragging rights. Sunny Anderson and Giada De Laurentiis bring their wits and expertise to the arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sweet But Sour
programme.desc: It's all about dessert as competing Chicago pastry chefs Kym DeLost and Chris Teixeira put their friendship in the blast chiller and see who can satisfy Sunny Anderson and Katie Lee's sweet tooth.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Drop the Knife
programme.desc: Stand-up comedian Colin Quinn and the dashing Katie Lee bring two New York chefs to challenge Bobby. Alex Guarnaschelli's protégé Diane Vista-Wayne and Daniel Boulud's protégé Lauren Brown compete.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: How You Bean?
programme.desc: Food Network's Damaris Phillips and Sunny Anderson show up to light a torch under Bobby Flay's stove and set his kitchen ablaze. Chefs Brian Lopes and Jesse Wykle go head-to-head for a chance to make waves in Bobby's kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: It's a Date
programme.desc: Things get shrewd when Iron Chef's Alex Guarnaschelli and Alton Brown join forces. It's up to partners in business and in life, chefs Lisa Carlson and Carrie Summer, to outsmart the one and only Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bye Bye Birdie
programme.desc: Michael Symon and Jet Tila work hard to outsmart their good friend Bobby Flay. They bring in one of his protégés, Chef Rebecca Weitzman, and fine dining's finest, Chef Brian Lewis, to muscle Bobby out of his kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Worldly Ways
programme.desc: The Kitchen's host Sunny Anderson and world traveler Andrew Zimmern join forces to beat Bobby Flay. They handpick Brooklyn's finest Jared Forman and Italian master chef Fabio Viviani to deliver the win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Perched for Victory
programme.desc: Worst Cooks in America's Anne Burrell gets a little help from her friend Valerie Bertinelli on the mission to bring down Bobby Flay. They recruit Napa Valley's Elizabeth Binder and Washington, D.C.'s Mike Ellis to help them.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Drop the Mic
programme.desc: Chopped's Amanda Freitag and comedian Jo Koy show up to boo Bobby Flay out of his kitchen. They invite Washington, D.C.'s Ryan Hackney and Nora Haron from the California Bay Area to bring their kitchen skills to beat Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Chef and restaurateur Richard Blais and TV host Natalie Morales have their sights set on taking down Bobby Flay. They bring in San Antonio's premiere Mexican chef Johnny Hernandez and skilled New Jersey chef Coby Farrow.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Chef Adrianne Calvo is bringing her Miami heat as she goes head-to-head with German native and top Pennsylvania chef Ben Thomas.

programme.title: Jessie: The Princess and the Pea Brain

programme.title: Bunk'd: Hot Spring Friend Machine

programme.title: Bunk'd: Water Under The Dock

programme.title: Big City Greens: Chipocalypse Now

programme.title: Black-ish: Super Rich Kids
programme.desc: Dre has always felt his older son was never like him, but when he finally meets Junior's cool friends, Dre is all in and happy that his son may have the opportunity for an actual social life.

programme.title: Movie: The Peanuts Movie
programme.desc: While Snoopy and his crew take to the skies to hunt for the Red Baron, Charlie Brown stresses about how to make a good impression on the new girl in town.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: Collision Course
programme.desc: When Scrat accidentally sets of a chain of events that cause a meteor storm to head toward Earth, it is up to the old gang to save the planet. Sid, Manny, and Diego go on an epic adventure to find clues to stop the meteor and save the world.

programme.title: Movie: Angry Birds
programme.desc: An island of happy, flightless birds is visited by a ship of mysterious green pigs, led by Leonard. Red, a bird with anger problems, doesn't trust them, but he is ignored. When their eggs go missing, it is up to Red and his friends to get them back.

programme.title: Life: Creatures of the Deep
programme.desc: A journey into the uncharted corners of the ocean where the newest discoveries are being made and where the strangest sea creatures can be found.

programme.title: Life: Plants
programme.desc: Enter the world of plants as time-lapse technology makes this violent and self-seeking organism's behaviour a truly dynamic and surprisingly emotional experience.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Planet Earth: A Celebration
programme.desc: This program highlights eight of the most extraordinary sequences from 'Planet Earth II' and 'Blue Planet II.' In addition to new narration, the sequences will include an arrangement of original scores from composer Hans Zimmer and Jacob Shea.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Enemy Within
programme.desc: As the '90s progress, America becomes more divided and fragmented. In Waco, an obscure religious cult becomes a lightning rod for a fear of big government invading our homes.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: In the '90s, new attitudes and new technology equal more freedom, more fragmentation, more diversity, but also more conflict.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Exposed
programme.desc: It’s the countdown to the end of the century and the party of all parties, but pre-millennium tension is rising.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: The Countdown
programme.desc: The world falls in love with a heartbroken Princess Diana and grieves her passing. Americans are shocked by the senseless killings at Columbine, and surprised by the 1998 midterm elections. 'The West Wing' reaches TV screens; Lewinsky affair continues.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: America Goes to War
programme.desc: We tell the opening chapter of this decade. A time when everybody got wired, war went high-tech, reality TV became way too real and everyone became a celebrity.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Reality Bites
programme.desc: We tell the story of the early '90s growing obsession with sex, celebrity and reality TV. While some women, like Anita Hill, are fighting against becoming sex objects, others like Anna Nicole Smith can’t wait to get their clothes off.
